Friend,

**THE FIGHT'S NOT OVER YET.**
While we may have taken back the House, we failed to flip the Senate. [**Can you rush $10, $25, or even $50 today to keep the fight going & stop the woke left? >>**](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=3b4cda5a12f341da921c72990953bda1&_e=T9Je7NBJuvWGg590cE5sMAR9-3q1rWph4e56eHgRNX5E2TbNNJrovkiGOmV_sxCLuLAeh1vnViKUWwjxLUZQWLa7BY2BN9k7imxf3v9rW1Hd8H6_O0f4EmgbE6uf0Ve62aQTTbxoU4i_MxlbAPePqKSA77fCI28teIWZAJ_9a1B97PjTeYlx2Yl0eXlqVf3YV9zSvELD8qjhEPMSZgybrEC-1VUte1lsTxy3H5tcozHiclaM9ArA48-RCUkp8FSwHmQA8Z0d8dpSsTZ6WbdLn2ngqLdpNgUEanBwnmMf8-p-8-XJV-NO1qZhk1Gu7wnn7NvLClZ_WcXuL89Mw1SANzhyEGS-eLwy2pnj-PU2dOTMzskBYGdiOuElOmrLGZaG_PehTV8lmlewaaxeC9LLpkeR8hSKb1dGqTVoFethF0rndo4K-qtISey9k0WYfwLJF2AOLUNLjq1cm_VP-MxI4I8PIeMloYHQo8cNU94Z1hbhwSEJ1OVmC1LwRm66on13SqMVUgdRPHR_z0wSZElfkQ%3D%3D)

We have to stand strong against the Radical Left's woke agenda, stop Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and fight for our freedoms. We can't afford to get complacent and let them have their way.

clean_body: | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Friend, THE FIGHT'S NOT OVER YET. While we may have taken back the House, we failed to flip the Senate. Now more than ever, we need concerned patriots to continue the fight for conservative policies. We need Republican wins. We have to stand strong against the Radical Left's woke agenda, stop Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and fight for our freedoms. We can't afford to get complacent and let them have their way. | \- Ted Budd | Senator-elect Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: January special elections
body:
We need to mobilize right now, so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections. | | |
---
| | This year, state Democrats notched key victories in ultra-competitive states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Minnesota that led to flipping chambers across the nation. Now, FIVE special election battles are on the books for January – and we’re running out of time to ensure our state Democrats have the support they need! Just _look_ at the races happening next month: | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
1/3 | Georgia | HD-7
1/10 | Virginia | HD-35
1/10 | Virginia | SD-7
1/10 | Mississippi | HD-23
1/31 | Pennsylvania | SD-27
These races are important opportunities for Democrats – **Virginians will be heading back to the polls next November for Election Day, so victories in some of these upcoming special elections could set the tone for 2023 and beyond.**
But that means we need to mobilize _right now,_ so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections.

subject: Bad Democrats have to GO, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier to Entry PAC
body:
Friends: Do NOT read the New York Times today.
| | | [](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=e6bbe68a6c&e=007b353608)
---
If you haven’t seen the news, Democratic Mayor of New York, Eric Adams, will begin **__forcibly hospitalizing__** unhoused people who are mentally ill.

**Read that again, friends.**

I honestly thought I was reading an article by The Onion when I first saw this... but sadly, it’s very real. This is another example of inexcusable, Democrat-driven failure at the local level.

**_At B/E PAC, we are simply disgusted._**

I don’t know about you, but I for one am sick and tired of seeing our own Party betray the values we claim to be fighting for — passing policies that benefit the people who are driving up rent, instead of helping those who can’t afford it.

**This is why as a PAC, we have maintained our focus of electing progressive Democrats locally in areas where we can win and make an impact.**

Our endorsed Barrier To Entry PAC candidates saw huge success in the 2021-2022 election cycle. We are fighting back at the local level to keep out-of-touch corporate Democrats like NYC Mayor Eric Adams out of office.

As just one example -- Because of your strong support, we helped elect **Commissioner Shenise Turner-Sloss** to Dayton City Commission where she led the charge to eliminate Shot Spotter from the city’s budget — an ineffective and unreliable police surveillance technology. Now, she is leading the charge for a more equitable city budget that the people of Dayton have been calling out for yet have been denied.

**Leaders like Shenise are the type of working-class champions that B/E works to elect because we need to make sure that corrupt, bad Democrats like Eric Adams stay away from levers of power within our Party and in our cities.

** [**Our work isn't over yet. There are still municipal elections ahead in places like New Jersey this cycle. Can you chip in $20 to help us take our fight to the next level?**](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=f5edc8c7ce&e=007b353608)

**______[CHIP IN 18 →](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=eb63ce9dd1&e=007b353608)** **______[OTHER AMOUNT](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=b37a54a206&e=007b353608)** Thanks for being in this fight,
**_\-- Megan
_** (B/E Digital Director)
[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=d52cdf488d&e=007b353608)
* * *
************************** ** **************************************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC:** _If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | **************************************[$10](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=f2132b99c0&e=007b353608 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2221208_FR_baddems_BEL&refcode2=EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10")** | **************************************[$25](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=efa3dd69e0&e=007b353608 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2221208_FR_baddems_BEL&refcode2=EL25&express_lane=true&amount=25")** | **************************************[$50](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=d3041980ea&e=007b353608 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2221208_FR_baddems_BEL&refcode2=EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50")** | **************************************[$100](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=dfc437fb84&e=007b353608 "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=2221208_FR_baddems_BEL&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100")**
---|---|---|---

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC** is proudly 100% women owned and operated — by women of color, queer women, progressive women — who are committed to achieving social change through inclusive public leadership. Our mission is to build a political space that reflects and works for ALL of us by helping pro-choice, lower income candidates run for office. Because it's time to elect actual working-class representatives to represent the working class. _******[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=e65c9b1fe2&e=007b353608)****_Pitch in today to break barriers with us! >>_**_ **______[DONATE →](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=c9744fef16&e=007b353608)**

Leaders like Shenise are the type of working-class champions that B/E works to elect because we need to make sure that corrupt, bad Democrats like Eric Adams stay away from levers of power within our Party and in our cities. ____ __ Thanks for being in this fight, \-- Megan (B/E Digital Director) ********************** ************************************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC: If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | ************************************ "" | ************************************ "" | ************************************ "" | ************************************ "" ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC is proudly 100% women owned and operated — by women of color, queer women, progressive women — who are committed to achieving social change through inclusive public leadership. Because it's time to elect actual working-class representatives to represent the working class. **** in today to break barriers with us! >> ______ | || || P.O Box 1234 Columbus, OH 43204 | | Paid for by Barrier to Entry PAC

name: Stop GOP Gerrymandering
subject: how Ron DeSantis all but guaranteed a GOP House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
*before a single vote was even cast*
|
---

Team, it looks like Ron DeSantis is plotting a 2024 presidential campaign, and he’s willing to do almost _anything_ to advance his political ambitions. Now, far-right Republicans are crediting DeSantis with helping to secure a GOP House Majority — _before a single vote was even cast_.

**How?

You guessed it: Gerrymandering.** **“Republicans...are now praising [Governor DeSantis] for strong-arming his own party to approve his congressional maps, which netted Florida Republicans four additional congressional seats on Election Day and essentially helped the GOP win the tiny House majority.”

**_FIRST:_** Governor Ron DeSantis VETOED congressional maps passed by Republicans in the Florida legislature... _because the maps weren’t gerrymandered enough!_

**_THEN:_** DeSantis proposed a gerrymandered map that was so extreme, _even a DeSantis-appointed judge_ indicated it unconstitutionally suppressed Black votes.

**_NOW:_** Republicans are crediting DeSantis and his gerrymandered map with netting Republicans four congressional seats, **allowing the GOP to take back the House despite their lackluster performance on Election Day.**

**_IN OTHER WORDS,_** **Ron DeSantis forced his gerrymandered map on Floridians, and now the entire country has to live with a Republican-led House of Representatives.**
**But here’s the good news, team:_The NDRC is fighting back._**
We’re not slowing down in our efforts – instead, we’re doubling down on our work to hold map manipulators like Ron DeSantis accountable, help elect fair-minded judges, defeat anti-democratic tactics in court, and more.

Republicans have signaled that they no longer view redistricting as a once-per-decade event — instead, they’re ramping up their efforts to _continue_ manipulating maps. **That means we need to be prepared to ramp up our efforts to stop them.**

[**_Are you with us, team? clean_body: before a single vote was even cast | Team, it looks like Ron DeSantis is plotting a 2024 presidential campaign, and he’s willing to do almost anything to advance his political ambitions. Now, far-right Republicans are crediting DeSantis with helping to secure a GOP House Majority — before a single vote was even cast. How? You guessed it: Gerrymandering. “Republicans...are now praising [Governor DeSantis] for strong-arming his own party to approve his congressional maps, which netted Florida Republicans four additional congressional seats on Election Day and essentially helped the GOP win the tiny House majority.” — POLITICO = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = FIRST: Governor Ron DeSantis VETOED congressional maps passed by Republicans in the Florida legislature... because the maps weren’t gerrymandered enough! THEN: DeSantis proposed a gerrymandered map that was so extreme, even a DeSantis-appointed judge indicated it unconstitutionally suppressed Black votes. NOW: Republicans are crediting DeSantis and his gerrymandered map with netting Republicans four congressional seats, allowing the GOP to take back the House despite their lackluster performance on Election Day. IN OTHER WORDS, Ron DeSantis forced his gerrymandered map on Floridians, and now the entire country has to live with a Republican-led House of Representatives. But here’s the good news, team:The NDRC is fighting back. We’re not slowing down in our efforts – instead, we’re doubling down on our work to hold map manipulators like Ron DeSantis accountable, help elect fair-minded judges, defeat anti-democratic tactics in court, and more. Republicans have signaled that they no longer view redistricting as a once-per-decade event — instead, they’re ramping up their efforts to continue manipulating maps. That means we need to be prepared to ramp up our efforts to stop them. = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Input Needed
subject: You’re invited…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Even though we successfully expanded our Senate majority, things are still precarious right now. With such a razor-thin margin, we cannot take a single vote -- or a single day -- for granted.

Our Senior Leadership Team has been reviewing the political landscape ahead, but we need reliable responses from voters so we don't make a mistake. **That's why we selected a few top Democrats to send our Grassroots Strategy Survey for our expanded Democratic majority's First 100 Days -- and you were selected.**

This is one of the DSCC's most exclusive focus groups, and you should feel proud to be chosen at this pivotal moment in American history. But with time running out before we lock in some of our most critical strategy decisions, it's vital that you share your input immediately.

| | USER ID: **9716520**
---

**To: Rep. Jamie Raskin**
**From: A strong Democrat** Dear Congressman Raskin,

I can’t thank you enough for your hard work over the years and on the January 6 Committee to condemn far-right extremism in our country.

Thanks to the evidence you’ve revealed, we’re one step closer to finally holding Trump and his MAGA traitors accountable for their crimes in the horrific January 6 insurrection.

**I know it isn’t easy standing up to vicious GOP attacks, but your bravery and leadership is _exactly_ what our nation needs right now.** [**So today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to thank you for your heroic efforts and to keep electing incredible leaders like you. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37378?t=8&akid=5766%2E878179%2ErIRrJ_) | [DONATE $7 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37378?t=9&akid=5766%2E878179%2ErIRrJ_)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Elon Musk didn’t like me calling him out for rising hate speech on Twitter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, the facts are clear, and the data backs it up. Hate
speech is up across Twitter since Elon Musk’s $44 billion acquisition.
Neo-Nazis, homophobes, conspiracy theorists, and racists are flocking to
create accounts.

Today, I sent Musk a letter demanding he take action, and laying out the
facts.

Musk didn’t appreciate being called out on it, and his trolls have already
proven my point — ramping up their antisemitic and QAnon attacks on me
with ferocious intensity in just the past few hours.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221208-musk-twitter-letter-vsp.tldnZu&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]Adam Schiff @RepAdamSchiff On Elon Musk's Twitter: -Slurs against Black
people have tripled -Slurs against women are up 33% -Slurs against Jewish people
are up 61% -And slurs against gay men are up 58% These numbers are abysmal - and
unacceptable. Today, @RepMarkTakano and I are demanding action. Elon Musk
@elonmusk False, hate speech impressions are actually down by 1/3 for Twitter
now vs prior to acquisition @CommunityNotes

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221208-musk-twitter-letter-vsp.tldnZu&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]Derek, it is essential that we stop the spread of hate speech
on Twitter and social media. We cannot back down from Elon Musk and his
supporters’ efforts at intimidation. Cosign our letter demanding that he
take action to combat the rise in dangerous hate speech on Twitter today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221208-musk-twitter-letter-vsp.tldnZu&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]ADD YOUR NAME

Here are the facts since Musk’s acquisition:

Slurs against Black people have tripled.

Slurs against women are up 33%.

Slurs against Jewish people are up 61%.

Slurs against gay men are up 58%.

And engagement with these hateful tweets has increased by an astounding
273%.

That is the truth. The tens of thousands of Musk’s supporters piling on
Twitter attacks against me with each passing minute will not change that.
In fact, it will only reinforce it.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221208-musk-twitter-letter-vsp.tldnZu&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221208_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]Elon Musk must moderate hate speech on Twitter. Cosign my letter to
Twitter’s new CEO today.

Thanks for raising your voice. Together, we are more powerful than the
forces of hate and prejudice working against us.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1435%2E5257348%2EXWEqVZ

As a New Yorker myself, I’m ashamed to see what’s happening in NYC, and as long as progressives refuse to prosecute criminals in the city, things will only get worse. This is a horrible idea. Just look at the skyrocketing crime rates in New York, Philadelphia, Chicago, and DC. In just New York City, rape is up 10.9 percent, robberies are up 32.4 percent, burglary is up 29.1 percent, and grand larceny is up 38.5 percent from 2021. ([source](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkcuOnDAQRb8GdkZ-NNAsWCTTmkiZKIvskg0qbEM78YM2Roh8fQqG6UUkqyzfY5er6uqWVTUtS1E211y1UMGgVW5aTjlnnDaUC0Z5UTFgkkrZsKauKNDsQrUDYwtgK8QYgitkcPm9lRSUEsNFDKpsdFXWABVmrASFQTQDz217T2maM_Ep46-41nUt-qhN6iGmPQlqMhqncd-LwI0xDLTE4DdJDkjmBMnMyciZRJg0WSbCKGnIpKPUPpEY-l7HbdcFJ5en3i9xtPAOeEPYE4wRvCKI8PT-7ErKD7qXKl6X5DqnlVlcJm5H-xmvdnEOC15D0UvbgZusGbYTSTyCGT3CY6BXgt9EvY4QsWHjQ6eCx1aC74wbdXdOs4ugjASLDXcKuj6GPzoC8tOX60f64NNe3_E1KTcA-Mt__PqKuPPWKAT_iXejcPg3-_Z4UXTVeWzVtBprzVzV6Op4uLp7efbRZvXnjPPjGbqx28YfP1cXl9_u7Qv5dgHyqL67cof8BWPaJv28eSYpzmnxrL79Awm1y00)) **_When progressive DAs let criminals go free, our streets are less safe, period._** **That’s why I’m fighting every day in Washington to stop progressive ideologies that aim to defund law enforcement, eliminate cash bail, and make our cities less safe.**

| | Friend, I’m Andrew Garbarino, Republican Congressman from New York’s 2nd district. **When I was a member of New York’s State Assembly,**_**I voted NO on no-cash bail**_**, and I warned my colleagues about the deadly consequences of this radical policy.** Now, I’m doing everything I can to stop it nationwide in Washington, D.C. and make our communities safer for everyone. I believe that district attorneys like Alvin Bragg in NYC are single-handedly putting the lives of our kids, families, and small business owners at risk.
* _They eliminate cash bail._
* _They refuse to prosecute career criminals._
* _They give violent offenders soft sentences._
* _They let mobs of criminals loot small businesses._

clean_body: As a New Yorker myself, I’m ashamed to see what’s happening in NYC | | | Friend, Did you see what New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg did? He downgraded 52% of the city’s felonies to misdemeanors, letting more violent criminals off easy. As a New Yorker myself, I’m ashamed to see what’s happening in NYC, and as long as progressives refuse to prosecute criminals in the city, things will only get worse. This is a horrible idea. Just look at the skyrocketing crime rates in New York, Philadelphia, Chicago, and DC. In just New York City, rape is up 10.9 percent, robberies are up 32.4 percent, burglary is up 29.1 percent, and grand larceny is up 38.5 percent from 2021. () When progressive DAs let criminals go free, our streets are less safe, period. That’s why I’m fighting every day in Washington to stop progressive ideologies that aim to defund law enforcement, eliminate cash bail, and make our cities less safe. If you’re like me and you believe in backing the blue, prosecuting violent criminals, and standing up for law and order, | | Friend, I’m Andrew Garbarino, Republican Congressman from New York’s 2nd district. When I was a member of New York’s State Assembly,I voted NO on no-cash bail, and I warned my colleagues about the deadly consequences of this radical policy. Now, I’m doing everything I can to stop it nationwide in Washington, D.C. and make our communities safer for everyone. I believe that district attorneys like Alvin Bragg in NYC are single-handedly putting the lives of our kids, families, and small business owners at risk. They eliminate cash bail. They refuse to prosecute career criminals. They give violent offenders soft sentences. They let mobs of criminals loot small businesses. Coming from a family of small business owners, I understand just how destructive these soft-on-crime policies are first-hand. If we want to save our communities, we have to change course FAST... and I’m counting on you to join my fight and make our streets safer for everyone. | | Thank you, Andrew Garbarino Congressman, NY-02 | | | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Your partnership with Judicial Watch….
body:
You have an enormous stake in helping protect the honesty and integrity of American elections...the linchpin of our Republic.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Working with concerned citizens across the country, Judicial Watch has been a powerful tool in holding corrupt politicians accountable to the law...and to the American people.
Our partnership with our patriotic supporters has helped us fight...and fight effectively....to keep our elections honest...expose and challenge taxpayer-funded support for Critical Race Theory indoctrination in our schools and military..._and investigate and_ _publicize serious allegations of Biden family corruption_!
Thank you!
But we face even greater challenges in the year that lies ahead!
**And as we prepare for 2023,[I urge you to stand with us here on the front lines again by supporting Judicial Watch with a tax-deductible donation.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Our ability to count on your support _now_ will help us determine in many ways just how effective we can be in 2023..._and has a direct impact on our ability to stay on track with existing programs and expand into other key programs critical to our mission_.

**_In 2023 we 'll keep fighting to keep our elections honest_.**

_Rather than just talking about voter fraud, Judicial Watch takes action_ ... _and we win_! We scored important successes for honest elections in **California,****Ohio, Indiana, Kentucky** and **Florida** - and this year we settled our lawsuit against **North Carolina** after our lawsuit caused the state to remove over 430,000 ineligible names from their voter rolls.

We also sued **Colorado** , **New York** and **Pennsylvania** in cases that are still pending, and our election law team is reviewing federal and state data to determine if we will issue more "warning" notices to states and counties failing to clean their voter lists as the **National Voter Registration Act** requires.

This year, we also broke _new ground_ when we successfully challenged a vote-rigging, congressional redistricting "gerrymander" in **Maryland** by their Democratic legislature; and in **Illinois** , we are challenging a state law that permits mail-in ballots (even those without a postmark!) to be counted up to _two weeks_ after Election Day.

Since our constitutional republic _depends_ on transparency and the integrity of our elections, we are prepared to go to court against anyone...whether a Democratic or Republican state election official, the Biden administration or a Soros-funded group.

**_In 2023 we will keep fighting to secure our borders_.**

Judicial Watch has long been the national leader in fighting for the enforcement of our laws against illegal immigration, _and we are exposing the open-borders Biden administration to educate Americans about the disastrous Biden border crisis_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

We also sued the state of **California** and **Montgomery County, Maryland** for illegally awarding taxpayer-funded Covid benefits to illegal aliens.

**_In 2023 we will continue to investigate and prosecute serious allegations and evidence of Biden family corruption_.**

Judicial Watch has been, too often, the "only game in town" when it comes to digging into the overseas influence-peddling schemes of President Biden's son, Hunter Biden...schemes which may well have profited Joe Biden as well!

We will continue our own investigations and litigation, and we are also mounting a national campaign to demand the new Republican Congress do what the Democratic Congress has failed to do...carry out its oversight responsibilities!

**_We will continue to file lawsuits exposing how tax dollars are used to promote Critical Race Theory ...while also fighting for conservatives' free speech rights to object to this racist and Marxist indoctrination_.**

We uncovered documents using state open records laws revealing that taxpayer money was used to try to indoctrinate students in Critical Race Theory (CRT) in **Maryland** , and our subsequent lawsuits have uncovered similar misuse of public funds in school districts in **Massachusetts, Illinois, Rhode Island** and **Virginia**.

We also sued to force release of documents _proving_ that the Biden team is indoctrinating **West Point** cadets with CRT propaganda - and we are suing for similar documents related to what is being taught at the **U.S. Naval Academy** and **U.S. Air Force Academy.**

_And_ we filed civil rights lawsuits on behalf of teachers fired _solely_ because they exercised their free speech rights to criticize CRT and other leftist programs in their schools. We achieved a big settlement for one of our clients recently, and we are currently prosecuting similar lawsuits on behalf of two other teachers, one in **Illinois** and another in **Massachusetts.**

But there's far more to do...so stay tuned for more legal actions to follow!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

**_We continue to sue liberal state and local governments violating the U.S. Constitution (and state constitutions) with "reversed racist" quota requirements and other schemes_. **

This year we won a taxpayer lawsuit which forced the city of **Asheville (NC)** to eliminate racially discriminatory provisions from a city-sponsored scholarship program available only to blacks. And in **California** , we filed two taxpayer lawsuits that led to courts striking down state quota laws based on race, ethnicity, gender and sexual orientation this year.

_No discrimination means no discrimination_ ...and we have just begun this fight!

**_In 2023 we will keep fighting for accountability in Congress_.**

Judicial Watch always keeps its ethics eye on Congress, regardless of which party is in control. _We know we cannot trust Congress to police itself_ ...and with a new Congress taking office next month, opportunities for corruption increase.

**_And in 2023 we will not give the Deep State a pass on its illegal secrecy_.**

The Biden administration has proved to be just as bad as former administrations in showing contempt for our open records laws and the American people's "right to know."

But we are holding them to the same standards we have every administration since we opened our doors in 1994...this means fighting government bureaucrats in federal court for access to public records Americans have a right to see!

[By supporting Judicial Watch Watch at this time](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE), you will help ensure that fellow Americans are educated about what their government is up to!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Our record shows that we are _uniquely_ qualified to _police_ our government, _protect_ our constitutional system, and _fight_ for government transparency.

_And we rely on you_ , as we have always relied on the selfless support of patriotic Americans _to help give us the resources we need_.

I thank you again for your generous support!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61334&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

|
---
|
---
Judicial Watch, Inc.
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
(C)2022, All Rights Reserved
Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |

---

Peter,

Is socialism the solution to saving our country? Well, according to Democrats, it is.

---

| **[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047838:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r)**
---

❌ Record high inflation rates
❌ New taxes and tax increases
❌ Out-of-control government spending
❌ Government overreach
❌ Destruction of small businesses

If we let Democrats continue to push their Socialist agenda in Congress, it will destroy **ALL** of the freedom and opportunities that Americans strive for.

Hardworking families would be left in the dust, small businesses would be destroyed, and our country will sink further into debt and recession.

We have to hear from you, though. **[Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047838:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r "Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?")**

---

| **[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047838:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r)**
---
**[SAY NO TO SOCIALISM!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047838:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r)**
---

Thank you for your feedback,

House GOP Alerts
---
* * *
****
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047839:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r)

Michelle Steel here. My story is like many Americans, it's an immigrant story.

Growing up, I heard of the horrors of communism from my parents, who had fled North Korea. We didn't have much growing up, but I worked hard and learned English, making it my third language. My mom and dad encouraged me to dream of a better life - **and I did. I became an American.**

I've spent my whole life fighting for the American Dream, and I won't stop. But now, that dream is under attack.
****
****
**[**Please consider chipping in today to help me continue defending Conservative values.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62047839:JEWlxoGNg:m:1:3331703221:44DA5F1AD9B9D7DA7CB8371A7BE7B0A6:r)

**If we don 't act now, the American Dream may be lost forever.**** And I think you agree that America _is worth fighting for._
****

"Will you sign our petition to say NO to socialism?" | Thank you for your feedback, House GOP Alerts Michelle Steel here. My story is like many Americans, it's an immigrant story. Growing up, I heard of the horrors of communism from my parents, who had fled North Korea. We didn't have much growing up, but I worked hard and learned English, making it my third language. My mom and dad encouraged me to dream of a better life - and I did. I became an American. I've spent my whole life fighting for the American Dream, and I won't stop. But now, that dream is under attack. If we don 't act now, the American Dream may be lost forever. And I think you agree that America is worth fighting for. ****Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress**** ****16027 Brookhurst Street, Suite I #428 Fountain Valley, CA 92708**** ** ** ** ****** ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. subject: Soros-Funded Nonprofit Gets $12 Mil from U.S. to Empower Workers in Latin America
body:
The Biden administration is giving a nonprofit partially funded by
leftwing billionaire George Soros’s Open Society Foundations (OSF)
$12 million to strengthen labor rights and empower workers in three
Latin American countries.

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 07, 2022

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61316&L=28525&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtdG8tZW1wb3dlci13b3JrZXJzLWluLWxhdGluLWFtZXJpY2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]

The Biden administration is giving a nonprofit partially funded by
leftwing billionaire George Soros’s Open Society Foundations
(OSF) $12 million to strengthen labor rights and empower workers in
three Latin American countries. The U.S. taxpayer dollars will go to
the Solidarity Center, a Washington D.C.-based group closely allied
with OSF as well as the country’s largest union conglomerate, the
American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations
(AFL-CIO). The Solidarity Center’s mission is to help workers across
the globe fight discrimination, exploitation and systems that entrench
poverty. It claims to accomplish this by empowering workers to raise
their voice for dignity on the job, justice in their communities and
greater equality in the global economy.

name: Your America
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7571%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=n2SoQEkD0lwZHrDD5NlXfQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96877%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wq1UYhvLejO3Cun%2bHBrqHg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96877%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wq1UYhvLejO3Cun%2bHBrqHg&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty -- the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96878%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DfV0B6%2fkXcSDMYPtPKE0xg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7571%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=n2SoQEkD0lwZHrDD5NlXfQ&sysid=1)_

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1ptkgl3rfprkv8v1b1noq0uk195cur03ev61vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor6cdh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zof1groqq3vbpobc7pnq27i7p1gcerpngj7aucq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor6cdh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

subject: I got a funny feeling

body:

Folks,

I woke up the other morning with a funny feeling.

Something that I could feel in my bones and my ankles, from my toes, running up to my brain.

I decided to go to the doctor to find out what was the matter, and he said that I have **_Patriolitis,_** meaning **[I have chronic Patriotism for our country.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn6pmn2jq797bi2sqn20ga839gt5eph07iouf4k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor6cjh2bs)**

I can assure you that there are plenty of Democrats currently in office who are immune from Patriolitis because they can’t stand to see our country succeed unless there’s something in it for them.

Unlike them, I’m only here because I want to serve you and our country. I’m fighting with every tooth and nail in my body to bring **Patriotism and love for God and Country back to Washington.**

Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th. name: 1600 Daily
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk4rvrned4g7a8l5k8u3ucq7777kv1k04f88nv3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeaob6chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp035439r4pj1vtp2gkbdrdnt85l17f3od3m9pfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeaob6chh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvb70rjbffvcag5uht5f1ijbqecef6da3f10sldg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeaob6chh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrkh7h3o5ma0rfu887cusdfrjgt79b75g0g9ajqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgb5dj26qcpkumkrsnkgo3k30thjjbrjj020o5e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3n5tpha1nhffht9oestenj8aqbe337ju84db690_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuqj4c0snuceeh2vmsugvhnjrmm5cpeit471ki0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoj2qounr60um7966iri8uqgu0bmd2rste5m2h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9v12t5tl9hs910d6rgg7nnishqbi7fbl1j23hr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgecor1c5h2bs)

name: American Briefing
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zilecin9sdec10ohnb0m6apf2s0spad98dn455l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeeoj4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdnuvbbvci9erjevshpja5ejnmk7odfkl7l0h4f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeeoj4cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zikm3b37d3a6q9r2td0tp0vn5v0qf7na6cbt7sio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeeoj4cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zheb2b1hjlef8nq3mf27fu725383oa2tp69o1gm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clgeeoj4cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7593%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=A9qdgA%2fIud1oF35VF%2fBxiw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77319%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KFTBKXsETAT8ABA4hgHc%2bA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77310%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O0eJEcCeN7vfbhzmHvEcOQ&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77311%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PP0G4Q0InpLnfLIFHbajrw&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77312%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4eVBhgl0eIQezywaTTg0Gg&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77313%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qK2LVixyQ9UdZTvGrLRnqA&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0257%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wjqkSTqTBkUmkanSAR0SUQ&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42125%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6DeKpIJo%2fPgWEEmPzhmDQ&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42126%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u%2fMrTb1jcEoPWcPBVLH2AQ&sysid=1) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42127%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fTPSePl3g4FHSHl2ZehIcg&sysid=1) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42128%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A0vN%2fFGYZ%2f7BSjjZbKjd2Q&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42129%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xc2XfRQc86hz%2firMbJPdnw&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42120%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kh4qclD2kTM%2f%2fWfJ8T07hQ&sysid=1) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42121%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rFc92yPckZeN8uGAH1RVvw&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42129%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xc2XfRQc86hz%2firMbJPdnw&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42122%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4JtezUqlJMWY2MT0OkA4mw&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42123%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtBZUDSMNUb33e2boAmefQ&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42129%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xc2XfRQc86hz%2firMbJPdnw&sysid=1)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. name: American Defense News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zia64g55d6qfk9odqbt4g3s1rl2tmkdgakol3sb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4d5cuv97sf7c6k7s4kfgchj089llhikv4fivtgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqhtdom949h3rc5aknk0uejv5vi0vf3j4fiiu8io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4q5hd6k1kcls34sf4tlbmk4jjhblru4odvlhjm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
