That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziv71j648spuhuo3purb6v4h43uecvc6hr744loo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lkv8i8ubafhu3fs6ticg3p553vp9pbt8i6c7qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zndtlfcpbeiisqtoq7oki8qu71ooe6b9n681kung_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq4b9mgpcptibsqn8t74278ib8qu12lbjsgghfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfh9bnmkjuge156seq0d1do9o877gj3h74m0hk3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7uqb8pl8sh4772g2jdec0d8a5gge8tkjte6n518_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqb64108u1fdfig0nnthkvc36a35uc514qpnlnfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z88erupqnb7sn8qam4egrpi7ijmu9j59r7ghhtbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpd1jshv9oedul95gqkvhg1uiffs2o4qtek7o7pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z02lh82hdfdcf77gau87dm8ka0qni748v8d3p9ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd0ja0vg8qb97qlnubjvst1fcsfmnar0nnop9phg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zchn829ocr5g2h32lsvcf55pvg9qqh8r073njrco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7mb246mjertu76508cpme74budujl4vqk31kq4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk40ucn81ovj8ohqd2msbrkb9ggv87da3on2vp00_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf3n4uev31rchhkr5ub2664evig9dvnnplmdpga8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm42qepn9a0u07c03pjf4sgu670apg75jtue82bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmn2r76nj59gaqlcvkr0vkaddk0ncdfpc10avevo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc17mfdm8qki3fha82n75g8qo5jmckt1jg0067d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z76saoihcr9ap3mnk4r50qdrc4h5htg75mrfmubo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhl6e44df48dujlejf3vl9hsi3q7f3u2h75mcvlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zch2ib6aei95nqav2pkiqihgbkqlba8ob57f54k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o76chh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zhkoi30hhi9267hcmitku6912a974tq3t6n0pjk8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv6b56vdhkhsjru5lsdmr5t5236podcublp4ngj8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1im9o30spi649fg)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The Republican descent into madness has been impossible to ignore, and it would be dangerous to look away.
body:
Madness and mayhem in the GOP
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3158dca2-06f6-4140-ba85-9aaa1967ecb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, **Thanks again for all you've done to fight for democracy this past year, right up to electing Senator Warnock just two days ago.** With the holidays approaching, we'll keep sending these short newsletters a few times per week with important information and to let you know about some projects of ours: *** Speaking of Tuesday,** once it became clear Herschel Walker lost, [Fox's Laura Ingraham had an on-air meltdown.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c30bad3-0afa-4bd9-902d-ff33735f35fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Yet, she couldn't bring herself to say the 2 words that explain WHY they lost. [WATCH this one-minute commentary, including the moment when Senator Warnock's win broke Laura Ingraham 😁](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td213f23c-31da-4e8e-9534-2cdb4b4b7f8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Link: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Lss8QblLqs4](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38e83dd8-e6da-4d78-91a9-85d5963d74b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **For those of you on Twitter,** yet looking for an alternative to Elon Musk's rule by fiat and impulse ownership, including letting prominent neo-Nazis back on the app (not to mention, Trump), I've [been enjoying Post ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfcac5c4-4ddb-4e8f-9b06-09e678d30370/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)as an alternative. [Check it out and follow me there if you're already on the app](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta817b008-dec5-451b-9628-12e98ceaf595/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): post.news/cliffschecter * **The Republican descent into madness** has become impossible to ignore.[ I recently did a video on the fight between white supremacist Nick Fuentes and conspiracy-mongerer Marjorie Taylor Greene. She accused him of being a child and he accused her of being in an adulterous relationship right now! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb506ecf-b87c-4b63-9744-18ae4200c707/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) They both called each other weak leaders (that part they both got right). At the Atlantic, on these same themes, Ron Brownstein talked about the [Fuentes & Kanye's nuttery,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1330caa9-765c-441b-90e4-1a446b056151/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)and Elaina Plott Calabro wrote about [how lunatic Marjorie Taylor Greene became who she is](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70ea401b-f723-4108-8dac-d6f061596ac9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). * ** Note: **Narratives are set when races are called, even if many votes aren't in. Such was the case w/ Sen. Warnock, up just 1% when he was declared the winner. Yet, cities/inner suburbs have many more votes, so they come in later, which is what happened with large chunks of Fulton & DeKalb Counties. Once votes were counted, Warnock won by 3%, ~51.5% to ~48.5%. He added +2% to his November win and overcame Georgia's 3-4% GOP lean by 3%. **_That's a major victory_ , and you should talk about it that way if any Republican or media figure claims it was close. In the end, it simply was not.** Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda—and important causes like abortion access—in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1ecaedd-0a15-4459-954b-37ed3c0667e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate Now**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa339cd0-1892-419a-b7a5-86643cb8961a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/newsletter12-9-2022-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td38e7020-6904-4f48-a9bb-1242435749b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlp3upr2874ojd27bd0c5r495i9kmrblu38qee8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o72cth2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And [what she's discovered is startling.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg7i8q02v6j5bk1uvrvalt02is18gq13du1gkr30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o72cth2bs) It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfh1qj4p6cjgel5ojs7f2bmg9lbmu16h54uvj3sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o72cth2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgq73dd115nj3kiq3sekb95g5s80v0scadtpnc9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie0o72cth2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zub0013ejisldqfg14biq9rm383togn0hvebt2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie4or2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi0eo0f8g0a51rb822tjhpd3n2m8a8vf60mb61n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie4or2cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2ql8ab666fec5u2hfk4ehnq2e45251b23ab8qfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie4or2cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
The Respect for Marriage Act passes the House with UNANIMOUS Democratic support!

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55738188/382661301/-1925813607?refcode=dpva-em-221209-rfma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDQwYjBiMS1jNzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Q4NKAxRTBVxwNOFz37BzFUVjeB0QrTpMVh--pAwEUc=) Derek, **Virginia’s entire Democratic delegation in the U.S. House voted YEA on the Respect for Marriage Act** – now, the bill is on its way to the White House, where President Biden will sign it into law and enshrine the right of all Americans to marry who they love. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that all states must recognize marriages between same-sex couples, protecting LGBTQ rights against any potential assaults from the GOP-led Supreme Court. The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that all states must recognize marriages between same-sex couples, protecting LGBTQ rights against any potential assaults from the GOP-led Supreme Court. Our fight to protect the civil rights of LGBTQ individuals does not end with this bill. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Thanks to Democrats’ unanimous vote yesterday, we’ve made a giant leap towards protecting LGBTQ rights. = Virginia Democrats =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Andy Kim
subject: A tremendous victory for this movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade earlier this year, Justice Clarence Thomas invited further challenges to personal freedom, naming marriage equality specifically.

Instead, his words galvanized a movement. This summer, I was proud to join a bipartisan majority in the House to send the Respect for Marriage Act to the Senate and defend every American's right to marry who they love.

Now, Congress is finally sending this bill to the President's desk to make these protections the law of the land.

This is a historic moment, and a tremendous victory for couples across New Jersey. As we celebrate this progress, it's important not to lose sight of the need to build off of this promise to all families that they can live in a country free from hatred, discrimination, and bigotry in all forms.

It's hard work, but it matters. And as always, I'm honored to stand at your side in this fight.

Andy

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Not Another Think Tank
body:
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agenc
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbhk0hc6e51okc7586u8bbhn9m8fkgtp46bdb4ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob4c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ucpm0o5mm2qjadtmedoj1cpjmhgr4djgecobeo70m9oj9dj26eomathmm2q66s77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhespm8c3nchj3ap5jchjr1db5e8iv0)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The most important thing for conservatives to remember about elections is that they are a means, not an end. In Washington, both parties act like the whole point of politics is just having power. But the point of politics is _using it_.
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agencies.
**[It’s not enough now to just stop the Left from doing wrong. We have to do right.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeonnhjopu6jae5o1i3ufllnsl0i9bdd3ki8o2g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob4c3h2bs)**
That is what the Conservative Partnership Institute has been doing all along. We are not another PAC focused on one election or a think tank pushing one issue. We are focused on every conservative idea _every day_ of the year.
CPI is the hub of the conservative movement’s wheel, the American Embassy inside the Swamp. We are the leading incubator of new conservative organizations, trainer of conservative staff, convener of conservative representatives and senators, and support for conservative communicators in Washington.
The Left has the media, the universities, corporate board rooms, and cultural elites. The Right has us.
**[Please join us in the fight to save America by making a tax-deductible contribution to CPI before the end of the year.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z42orihmdi1f7t8ph1e95l9h3asi10uou5389410_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob4c3h2bs)**
As Congress now looks toward 2023, conservatives are looking to CPI. We will be there to provide the guidance, the support, and the services the new Congress will need to rescue America from Joe Biden and the woke, socialist Left.

**Now the real work begins. Starting next year, conservatives must launch the investigations, impeachments, and reforms we need to take our country back.**
CPI will help conservatives in the House and Senate with the analysis, the message, the data, the strategy, and the spine to take on the Left and the DC Establishment.
**[Please help us give conservatives the best tools possible by making a tax-free donation to CPI today.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zflp4eco1te9h5dcdnsick4ssgc159l4ivso5fa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob4c3h2bs)**
With your support, we will not only make 2023 the end of woke Left tyranny but a new beginning for American freedom. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
**END OF THE YEAR** **COUNTDOWN**
---
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Hi team, how can we help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
I want to make sure your priorities are at the top of my list. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55741938/382676939/-1519112680?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221209_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDIxMDBmYS1jZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrWVYBm3VMOFe4DTgTzygM-n0yZxOUbLiwsujWqObfo=&emci=1662b491-3d76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3d2100fa-cd77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1295540) Hi team, With the final Senate election officially over, I’m looking forward to getting back to work in Washington with our new 51-seat majority. We’ve accomplished a lot already — addressing the climate crisis, passing nationwide protections for marriage equality, and investing in our nation’s infrastructure — but our work is far from over. That’s why I am reaching out to key supporters, like you, to see what issues and challenges are on your mind. **I want to make sure your priorities are at the top of my list in the weeks and months ahead.**[**Will you take a few moments to share what’s on your mind in my 2023 Senate Priorities Survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55741939/382676940/-1519112680?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221209_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDIxMDBmYS1jZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrWVYBm3VMOFe4DTgTzygM-n0yZxOUbLiwsujWqObfo=&emci=1662b491-3d76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3d2100fa-cd77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1295540) | **[COMPLETE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55741940/382676941/-1519112680?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221209_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDIxMDBmYS1jZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrWVYBm3VMOFe4DTgTzygM-n0yZxOUbLiwsujWqObfo=&emci=1662b491-3d76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3d2100fa-cd77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1295540)**
---
When you helped re-elect me, you placed your trust in me to speak for you and fight for you in Washington. That’s why it’s so important to me and my team that we know exactly what challenges you’re facing — and what hopes you have for the future.
While I wish I could speak personally with every member of this team, we’ll have to use the next best thing, so my team created this exclusive End of Year Priorities survey. It will take only a minute (two, max!) and couldn’t be more important to our work.
[**We will begin reviewing responses tomorrow morning, so please take our survey by midnight to be one of the first to help shape our 2023 plans →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55741941/382676942/-1519112680?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221209_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDIxMDBmYS1jZDc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrWVYBm3VMOFe4DTgTzygM-n0yZxOUbLiwsujWqObfo=&emci=1662b491-3d76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3d2100fa-cd77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1295540)

Michael

name: Olivia, All On The Line
subject: Will SCOTUS side with voters?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Voters did NOT want election deniers in office. Now SCOTUS could hand them the keys.
|
---

Voters sent a resounding message during the midterm elections -- they do NOT want election deniers in office. But as our movement prevents more and more gerrymandered maps, manipulating elections might be extreme Republicans’ only path to power.

**That’s why the _Moore v. Harper_ case that’s in front of the Supreme Court this week is so important.**

**[The Supreme Court heard arguments on this case yesterday. Will you add your name to our petition if you think SCOTUS should side with voters and uphold the fair map?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55742070/382677442/-1462679232?source=20221208_AOTL_F_mvh3_ActivesxSigners&refcode=20221208_AOTL_F_mvh3_ActivesxSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEwMGZhLWNkNzctZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvLYnrtJO87_wXO1sLsVJWqnf8NgV1wY6hJK6LhYIuY=&emci=e9ecf62b-f976-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=402100fa-cd77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**

So here’s the situation -- Republicans in North Carolina have a long history of manipulating maps. But voters keep prevailing in overturning those maps in court.

Since they can’t get their gerrymandered maps approved by the state courts, North Carolina Republicans are resorting to a fringe theory that would take checks and balances out of the equation.

**_That’s a huge red flag._**

North Carolina Republicans brought this case to the nation’s highest court because the state supreme court held them accountable for violating the law and stopped them from enacting a gerrymandered map. **The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters.**

We’ll keep you posted as things unfold.
\-- Olivia

Olivia Mendoza
Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

North Carolina Republicans brought this case to the nation’s highest court because the state supreme court held them accountable for violating the law and stopped them from enacting a gerrymandered map. The Supreme Court should see this for what it is -- an attempt to manipulate the system at the expense of voters. We’ll keep you posted as things unfold. \-- Olivia Olivia Mendoza Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7581%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=A1hIirCe45XrSxsz6ObhDw&sysid=1)
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96871%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LXCIYa1ycjpR4JNZm7nEGw&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96872%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SHZKCS9dBYv85FI0AC5tJA&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96873%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r6bg6%2b88cGodB1dCsfUlPQ&sysid=1)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications ...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancee, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96874%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JtsDYN7I0PxNARZ1Z0I3xg&sysid=1)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SjgyevxT2zcg1oltWqDGfA&sysid=1)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96886%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gVaqq%2fbSwewqPgaR6Sarpg&sysid=1)

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking. Thank you! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Update
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0252%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SODBoPJtscIrx44dwfS0vA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y4Q7hGH1fYOslzD%2bnrrodw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D8osxR2tNESfeZqsrRFhOg&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DsDp%2fEdcs8JTS4QsReEvAQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D8osxR2tNESfeZqsrRFhOg&sysid=1)**

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below: 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Wow! I Did NOT Expect This...
body:
The largest voting bloc in America is the Christian vote. In order, for President Trump to win the White House in 2024 it will take Christians in larg
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9141.1.ad889a15e9e6d9d55107f3e51ddd5d96)

|

| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9142.1.32a4826b73ef701a086fdc31c8f2a21b)
---
The largest voting bloc in America is the **Christian vote**. In order, for **President Trump** to win the White House in 2024 it will take Christians in large numbers getting out to vote. One of the ways to mobilize the Christian vote is to _mobilize_ the **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** in America. Therefore, this week we launched [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9143.1.10f17821eaecf4c400d4856d7b117fd1). You can read the full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9144.1.f7a207402ca8e318ebe11c941654930e)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9145.1.5eedaf1bb286f496f3d8260ce0ab14da) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start (much faster than I anticipated) and will have some exciting news to share here shortly! Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9146.1.8356eab3e441441804facb48e42ee240) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9147.1.18001e27415ac9b784935d8dc53af7c9) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9148.1.acbb49f3fc6832f28546db4e0f057ef2) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9149.1.239f0cf07ac50a0e449ee7d7547be7f7) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9150.1.270f373f0ece0e89959ee2983bcd697a) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9151.1.ebaeed96d4b5d210cd4b7fe4e2f64a31), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9152.1.03f2f06d576be6c6e66b824c491e0daa), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9153.1.9e9653a6e8e9d71d9cce90fe9da966ec), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9154.1.25800cd526d9f562553afe2db2dd01fa), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9155.1.feaf7a51fc23658fa0f6eb9f810eb14b) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9156.1.aa2d23d353b9a7f6085f853ff0011348)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9157.1.b3a3206a40eb875b34bf5ae38cbcaa63)
---
---
## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9158.1.411099b9c6a1feb4e02292027c320ca0)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9159.1.c9d4552363101f694bebc7ce10b1990f).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9160.1.e39d994aaef338cd56951bba8f409e90) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9161.1.a2e213a4e1c9c0c98bb3776850d6bc62) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9162.1.d00837bfb082eec17626ee1dc5dd0120) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9163.1.6d437cf03533c9fd6c42c2b89cbcb232)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15729914.9164.1.ca5f340e463994d754b213dd3be91a6e)

---

---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Not Another Think Tank
body:
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agenc
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z38pi83680avk0q6r6k17s97sg5o0beq74glbl0g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t34sspbcclm6tg74pr666qmec7468qjfcjim1hnctbgmlge0thlecomcslgmuoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32tpjcgo7ep366lhb6oj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeo35cjgm2pj1c8iv0)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The most important thing for conservatives to remember about elections is that they are a means, not an end. In Washington, both parties act like the whole point of politics is just having power. But the point of politics is _using it_.
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agencies.
**[It’s not enough now to just stop the Left from doing wrong. We have to do right.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztg6u6erbaf6uasfbajvrmgv3gver9kfcc2mv198_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob6c5h2bs)**
That is what the Conservative Partnership Institute has been doing all along. We are not another PAC focused on one election or a think tank pushing one issue. We are focused on every conservative idea _every day_ of the year.
CPI is the hub of the conservative movement’s wheel, the American Embassy inside the Swamp. We are the leading incubator of new conservative organizations, trainer of conservative staff, convener of conservative representatives and senators, and support for conservative communicators in Washington.
The Left has the media, the universities, corporate board rooms, and cultural elites. The Right has us.
**[Please join us in the fight to save America by making a tax-deductible contribution to CPI before the end of the year.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zm5j84re2hl2oehjk22vqfp9994ch4lqmosbit88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob6c5h2bs)**
As Congress now looks toward 2023, conservatives are looking to CPI. We will be there to provide the guidance, the support, and the services the new Congress will need to rescue America from Joe Biden and the woke, socialist Left.

**Now the real work begins. Starting next year, conservatives must launch the investigations, impeachments, and reforms we need to take our country back.**
CPI will help conservatives in the House and Senate with the analysis, the message, the data, the strategy, and the spine to take on the Left and the DC Establishment.
**[Please help us give conservatives the best tools possible by making a tax-free donation to CPI today.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeksql3md294r3r3kqoirtilcq586j4h05m6v340_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie2ob6c5h2bs)**
With your support, we will not only make 2023 the end of woke Left tyranny but a new beginning for American freedom. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
**END OF THE YEAR** **COUNTDOWN**
---
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: [Breaking Senate news] Kyrsten Sinema has left the Democratic Party, taking away our Senate majority, and snatching defeat from the jaws of victory. Stand with Ruben Gallego to answer this betrayal.
body:
Lost our majority already?!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9737112a-19e7-43ce-9ea2-b101f856aace/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **Well, she's done it, KYRSTEN SINEMA HAS STABBED EVERY DEMOCRAT IN THE BACK.** **_During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years is when Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent._ ** _Sinema's counting on our being scared she'll split the vote in 2024 if we run a true Democrat, that we'll sit back and take her betrayal. Don't let her do it. You win not with fear, but leadership. _ _**_Congressman Ruben Gallego is a force, a charismatic, young, progressive Latino veteran, who understands "loyalty" in a way that is alien to Sinema. He's talked about primarying her already for all her betrayals. So let's get him in the race. Not next month or next year. NOW._** _ [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5e8afe4-5c1a-45d3-be3a-46bd8c0a91d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Only a response that Democrats won't be held hostage, will support Gallego with all they have while making her into a nobody by stripping her of all Senate power will get this done. She can't caucus with Republicans, or her plan to appeal to some Democrats fails. If she caucuses with nobody, she is a nobody, and we still retain our advantage (50-49-1, instead of 51-49, still enough for us to have a real majority)._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T760e579f-749b-4fa1-af31-84867cefb577/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Even Joe Manchin didn't consult her when he cut a deal with Joe Biden in July. From CNN.com: _Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her._ **_So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024._** [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef173540-f640-454b-bc7b-122fd890b0e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
_Sorry we have to jump back into active mode again so soon. It wasn't what we wanted or expected. But, Sinema, as is her way, has left us no choice._ _I can't say thank you enough times._
---
Cliff

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: help us fight back
body:
This is about our sacred right to vote.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62050908:JW2SSoGNt:m:1:3331703221:799069CE96C1C85CD8B6751DBE9F5090:r)

69% of Democrats agree that voters in Arizona were denied their sacred right to vote.

But this isn't just about Republicans or Democrats. This is about the right of all Americans to vote! A right that many voters were sadly deprived of on November 8th.

That is why we have been filing these lawsuits. My team is busy at work as we try to fix this mess of an election...IF you want to protect the future of our nation from this den of leftist thieves, can you chip into our efforts?

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=709c692949a2416e82e4fa3131709b0f&_e=cZWR9p06I1kZG1xhAj4cseZCRAfkFDzBC-YujWsomGbyJh9m1k_6o5cm0BnzILfRmQCl8GX8_e85E6lP_z_Ls73_dPGTsn-NBeD0AdhQ41KkRehUX7N2NbR-rGIfyf5Y5LAm_bA4y00A3SKxKKfi_z2NwRkSOAEU5ewgKW1dpw3CpcP6Rl_QRaXZgAYziADlL1t_60GPlowgjmUR2k52K9ba1hRbaEJCyWNIzC4R6ZC2BLMY9tGF0ULwVS-Ys17Q8boOIysEa5wUH6ND2NeTDCWeSJyFasYr8RkUyyh18Qq7aFGzfxMbnODUwixB_O2aHyxfGwOqQpNasmFtyhTt1KrWerDGzog0wDnaSaQx1SiFLDGyWzIX1FcOvNfvEsjpnJeJ2ZBllb5TFI-1kysCub7H9hHyZe5KULMw6uHQ8IU%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=709c692949a2416e82e4fa3131709b0f&_e=cZWR9p06I1kZG1xhAj4cseZCRAfkFDzBC-YujWsomGbyJh9m1k_6o5cm0BnzILfRmQCl8GX8_e85E6lP_z_Ls73_dPGTsn-NBeD0AdhQ41KkRehUX7N2NbR-rGIfyf5Y5LAm_bA4y00A3SKxKKfi_z2NwRkSOAEU5ewgKW1dpw3CpcP6Rl_QRaXZgAYziADlL1t_60GPlowgjmUR2k52K9ba1hRbaEJCyWNIzC4R6ZC2BLMY9tGF0ULwVS-Ys17QZZplNK_h7TXxYGar1oP9gBt45JqqH7LP81IMIEKj24COlrcZAtGCn9pXJetZNUV40ITLtxifEUFGbi1gWqS-VFrJBR8NdyGBWLBW7T_rwZMvEuS6JFzWlLhc0XTylrXvWned5o60fuSInu_alqLcdQnL2DHWwrTdhcXTOGp393M%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=709c692949a2416e82e4fa3131709b0f&_e=cZWR9p06I1kZG1xhAj4cseZCRAfkFDzBC-YujWsomGbyJh9m1k_6o5cm0BnzILfRmQCl8GX8_e85E6lP_z_Ls73_dPGTsn-NBeD0AdhQ41KkRehUX7N2NbR-rGIfyf5Y5LAm_bA4y00A3SKxKKfi_z2NwRkSOAEU5ewgKW1dpw3CpcP6Rl_QRaXZgAYziADlL1t_60GPlowgjmUR2k52K9ba1hRbaEJCyWNIzC4R6ZC2BLMY9tGF0ULwVS-Ys17Q9bHZoE8sHA6iVFAXn2hYGJQ7qCKDfYmF1Thpmr3WNZxHNHpn4AqexW0VbPFvMVWZ53qO3Sf-_XM65lkrEC76YaAGRv0NKSBFVmbFwtxN9-jetypW-Blf4YW8fVdZPrSegJ6NZ3BV-a_YQSqeKDE5JjN6GPOZVM_VYUKNGr49_UM%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8vt77m7speejvaelu2tme71524ba14m3j7b0p28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zokfgqkibu70ntar6ghi3akf8inc1942t4e9giv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4nkbassaeuq9bt66jp2np6ju6cbo3elugf9g1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9kufhnsoe79cueghr599sdd3krepvo431afu828_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ghngeghinci30b52k2s893u1qgeatdicpm37bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5gmgdu46jcim49ok47emrg559t1ko7itobiujgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziecghuruhg3nn13uapmhaqfiuc0i252e20rri7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7tp0q90e0t4spu8afimjrn1rm51s5qf51j51bf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdrpub8kgl4pskt02n5fhsk9khfvsp4n5gug2vfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ca3jj87v4lcpm6r7k7h55er9jnq5fp258bcup0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7i544jbn6qosbte6ieqgfpile2h4ui9qdoq0q78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm3gstdat2f2889mv9674hb0k2rlbnqqrrk01q3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkuigq00ptoooeop73af0am8ajveke2c3gg9can0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ip59aa9ps8nbd58u5b3s7piflfksgqhsu4kdt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh73t3hbcrarb7kv3p45qc9jbi1ur75g0bb4ocb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvabqev1b313j1gv6kbffr5la2vp6ggg9918l3d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2nhna23c7cre1b90eud6f2stp0hmp817l48d6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvj4bt94vbmv9afr494eorg70rarrs98emjtv0oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zag2g15cracqi8q73o294dg2fh07up71j28j05ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6oob6ohde4cgmrri8hrkt2pvsnnc75ullvb1s40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpffdifefhpbbv96arn2mqu318gvvhpfnhi5qojo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0clie1o34cth2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
One dollar.

That’s the donation I’m asking you to make before midnight, Derek -- [**yes, just $1.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55748457/382703705/91184225?refcode=20221209_em_fr_b1_spm_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQzYTY4ZC1kYTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NolS2CdECleDI7H9OJFd8umt2_uBfLFJ1IdzAQ1P6oE=)

$1 to help me pay off the last of my campaign debt.

$1 to prove you don’t need to be a billionaire to run for office.

$1 to show real folks can run for office without fear of financial ruin.

I know $1 may not seem like a lot. But if everyone chips in, it all adds up fast.

So please, Derek: [_**Can you make a contribution of just $1 to help me pay off the last $2,404 of my campaign debt? Fellow Patriot,
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas!
**While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz918LdrACR_d8QmfVjbdXWOC8GIe6VV03bwHvd9GsrkYlpyPK9tK2YDpFsflR7LFOnRNP8Y0BxWq-nIdEq-YFK-mdSKvUA1iD03YarZ2CpT0vKpc8vKSiG2AMDani93uLHGkYAMcMl4hhAjYFNLmXaoa5duC58AKnJpUD0T83peMLk)

[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz917BHLsUaaQEI6FpWVf1SE9fRVZPKI56DRjaf0M-LpfzaiZXSfZG76y3oH1YrL5OYquWEic_-EebmJp4rV40sAK8J3sak6K-vWZhr_m32-F_s5Ejf8qrLAqBTaDHs9ywVDsZwE5MgmDpl-rnx9ydBZqxdALEju5mq-EjBN7J9qf1j)
