Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more...
**...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.**
[**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz91ym5DOj3XDntxJI4YzEL6vinpn7U7LJLvvvF_qfT6ZsJpqGl6HfGPnzqjieDELAh0GEfjlz67sD-nXF2OzBRvKBNnbv7i8MF2eEusL_5OTD4OImuwq-D1IDx1_OZDJN6Jb8T_RWmj2KVDeSG0U9SJM4zeEeDbZVHM-mV0lRRU_Xw)
_How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all.
You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA...
... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country...
... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses...
... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.
We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world.
**_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.**
And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today!
[**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz91y29jN2-xIIuk3vRPg2TX36M-6cjp7iKraLGqJIOQybgQDQL8eKJaXGTtMaTiyfoUkI23WuSAqUzByh20hDdztmiKuUQZzOdezfIPIeA1P4XTmuW7jZpu0sDu_tB2s0QDxhENmJb73K_F3vr_SPlnYz6jrZqm41OQHLyX0bLUuHu)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz915eDFtuVmUpHTxT5aPu9iQpFEV2nF0kY15YhhCyBpYFgdma6dHtJAUp1ACUbQFDa6WFs2Sdq03Gid4vd4QuNyiIyn0qKkuQM-XAQX5hGVqDwoPBlpgPMlXyC5Cpr3M8pkaJMvw0utitkDXb1lRD04an4d70IU5Y4BTjRRXKYZtM7)
---

Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.
And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America.
You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America...
**... we're _DOING IT!_**
With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again.
We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation.
This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend.
[**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7afd054b98a04d7f94ab08591c435f8c&_e=VLuagMuh0bL9vyaKWUG1X_C87Peq_B1i7FOQKaeGVo5W5UQEDqYsZeGTwsMu5VS7IRpkGX3MuRrL6NlCcGWW5yxXEZEMS5cuctz3rlCivGdohoD4sAXgQnzp4HQeJW950roFFpert0EKUX54goz91-zqjQgtYJB0m0neX4LKxbrRuM1xoHkLUHLp35xFJPnhLoMZDZbOfBqyc-vHwTk5Wa03maxfKkm4gFk8nO_AUzYfJzhApS7xgM1JPMvkqf-iCx-rZMJr22BywjT_J9j2GfTWoze-8wgumd6yizsmhX6DcbTNvALS_uaVANapVSlW)

clean_body: I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! | | | Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win \-- just in time for Christmas! While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ron Wyden
subject: It’s not just about what we can do, but where we’re headed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55752158/382718391/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDYwYjI1YS1lMzc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XonBpypxPyhlI9jMIj3nRwiw2cgZqvcI4uiyzRWoFaE=&emci=774514ae-3577-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=9d60b25a-e377-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Let's take a moment to exhale. On Tuesday, after one of the highest-stakes Senate races in history, **Georgia voters reelected Senator Raphael Warnock.** This means good things for our work in the Senate, as we can move ahead with building on the progress we've already made for the American people. More importantly, our victory in this election is a fresh light on the horizon of our democracy. Despite MAGA Republicans polluting our discourse with dysfunction, spite, cruelty and lies, **Georgians stepped up and elected a good, honest, compassionate Senator to represent them.** The choice between Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker was exceptionally clear, and the race shouldn't have been at all close. Senate Republicans still put their party ahead of our country, and attacked Rev. Warnock shamelessly while desperately waving away the fact that Walker is unfit to serve. We have a long way to go and a lot of work to do to defeat far-right extremism. **But this week, our movement saw not just a victory, but a**** _step forward_**. Let's take a moment to appreciate our hard work, and the progress we're making. We can do this. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Let's take a moment to exhale. On Tuesday, after one of the highest-stakes Senate races in history, Georgia voters reelected Senator Raphael Warnock. This means good things for our work in the Senate, as we can move ahead with building on the progress we've already made for the American people. More importantly, our victory in this election is a fresh light on the horizon of our democracy. Despite MAGA Republicans polluting our discourse with dysfunction, spite, cruelty and lies, Georgians stepped up and elected a good, honest, compassionate Senator to represent them. The choice between Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker was exceptionally clear, and the race shouldn't have been at all close. Senate Republicans still put their party ahead of our country, and attacked Rev. Warnock shamelessly while desperately waving away the fact that Walker is unfit to serve. We have a long way to go and a lot of work to do to defeat far-right extremism. But this week, our movement saw not just a victory, but a step forward. Let's take a moment to appreciate our hard work, and the progress we're making. We can do this. name: Kari Lake
subject: This isn't about Republicans or Democrats.
body:
This is about our sacred right to vote. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0267%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=CMZt2N%2fH2SNBhJ731cL4Hg&sysid=1)
This is about our sacred right to vote.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OonfTGCHS3QQGxbtKi4EXA&sysid=1)
---
69% of Democrats agree that voters in Arizona were denied their sacred right to vote.

But this isn't just about Republicans or Democrats. This is about the right of all Americans to vote! A right that many voters were sadly deprived of on November 8th.

That is why we have been filing these lawsuits. My team is busy at work as we try to fix this mess of an election...IF you want to protect the future of our nation from this den of leftist thieves, can you chip into our efforts?

[**WE NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KFGaj3%2btYkX60VP%2b2r2fUQ&sysid=1)

-Kari Lake

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zatbs4vhqgtvhagls7e6hlq6uit3us5o4a52i670_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdqri5jop8a4i56r1v1kgkp6gqrpoh4gvg826ctg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8dgk06ismjvpfdafpajubeplkkc9impl3gbnu9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4p6i4454nid3auot6ed90sqv2hkgcrriel20h0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8tifs2spguenlrbs463cvta5r998gvtie80kjd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6rjgi32unl29rjjhp4de4e0ea9degbqpruthv7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze1pmj3pd9besn6nci0efrqqisnme9v94olmo6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm1ecv392m26vqmva2qkgh3fspdgafj6aapsnrko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zosmf3cqqf34b1u5vncin709vf94gkmp3fp59d6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6cob5cjh2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: THANK YOU (via Left Action)
subject: Liz Cheney calls Trump "Enemy of the Constitution"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Add your name: Thank Liz Cheney for standing up to Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13efcc6e-fb35-4416-9465-1828570c88e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce2519dc-dc3d-4afd-8724-5207ea0d569f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump reached an all new low this week when he called for the termination of the Constitution to overturn the 2020 election and reinstate him to power. Some Republicans condemned Trump’s terrifying message, but most (predictably) shied away from criticizing Trump himself. Except for Liz Cheney – who didn’t hesitate to call Trump an “enemy of the Constitution.” We may disagree with Liz Cheney on 90% of issues, but Cheney did the right thing when it came to standing up to Trump. Republicans who do the right thing are very hard to come by these days. So we want to thank Liz Cheney for having the courage and integrity to fight back against Trump – and for the work she’s done to expose his lies about the 2020 election. [Sign your name: "Thank you, Liz Cheney" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74be3e7d-0ffe-4770-b045-a7af76316ba2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04a37ae7-a2dc-41a6-bf26-91ebfe040a49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

name: Kari Lake
subject: This isn't about Republicans or Democrats.
body:
This is about our sacred right to vote.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjg4drhtrciid58q17k8o2hricevvn6n7422ldd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6eo36c5h2bs)
---
69% of Democrats agree that voters in Arizona were denied their sacred right to vote.

But this isn't just about Republicans or Democrats. This is about the right of all Americans to vote! A right that many voters were sadly deprived of on November 8th.

That is why we have been filing these lawsuits. My team is busy at work as we try to fix this mess of an election...IF you want to protect the future of our nation from this den of leftist thieves, can you chip into our efforts?

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d601ffc776548d4bd1030912755f1c4&_e=X0y_VYzbVvJvgFnbSd1rlQqCMzWwCOnsBT3igv_lrCCt81LwJ9Uy7bN2kSeiyBrBr6ILplj1iuAu1VWpA3T122zdxiTSPIKL6MopD1k7GOIQkty0rIFiRxX36cJKMjGSWCQp5j1hclaGpTzn6vTeO94rOPuTIq5-rSh7cRl-j335jFhCzmbDofxELpw_hR6UcmXmlNXi1kdbvAzsMwT85q_VjeQkWd0Y7ecnANPC5VqiyQkIWruHliIDwUISPQHvsiwTS4Sgx3v7CYAm7dEWX2pxQu5OqmO-uXB25ziichj415OdQ1PU9UpN4cPUnBudB0fRv8w5fusZYZ3eoSoZ_SjJmOpfxvuU7m5RBJKY_kM%3D)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d601ffc776548d4bd1030912755f1c4&_e=X0y_VYzbVvJvgFnbSd1rlQqCMzWwCOnsBT3igv_lrCCt81LwJ9Uy7bN2kSeiyBrBr6ILplj1iuAu1VWpA3T122zdxiTSPIKL6MopD1k7GOIQkty0rIFiRxX36cJKMjGSWCQp5j1hclaGpTzn6vTeO94rOPuTIq5-rSh7cRl-j335jFhCzmbDofxELpw_hR6UcmXmlNXi1kdbvAzsMwT85reWLvJL310uh07bcdf2Lj-pKjPsWbCOu42urUeQNqoOKWVxJ1LWwahscX3cwlQ91rB2y3FysKyse7uIZVpBZVLfl3_hQiAFbrSp_K6EHth2OUE4lKz_8qUA3viVNjeDppoBIf1oFF3JUVnUjfKXatk%3D)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d601ffc776548d4bd1030912755f1c4&_e=X0y_VYzbVvJvgFnbSd1rlQqCMzWwCOnsBT3igv_lrCCt81LwJ9Uy7bN2kSeiyBrBr6ILplj1iuAu1VWpA3T122zdxiTSPIKL6MopD1k7GOIQkty0rIFiRxX36cJKMjGSWCQp5j1hclaGpTzn6vTeO94rOPuTIq5-rSh7cRl-j335jFhCzmbDofxELpw_hR6UcmXmlNXi1kdbvAzsMwT85hqJIlAn88-JroishcbEg0rcO859esPlvLh7i9z-aKOMFmC0HfgPwvO9Mik7o6KBxYG7_p48l5TnzjYgnAMCYdlF02pkFLhlBgKZ_HuDUp0kixwMgipq-vdwDclEXuEs72JjlwEn3aatsTjUdV6gzKs%3D)

body:
| Hi — Did you see this message from my team? Here at Team Kildee, we are focused on organizing seven days a week, 365 days a year.

Just as it was in November, Michigan’s Eighth Congressional District will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) congressional races in 2024 (and beyond). Because of redistricting, this congressional seat was drawn to always be competitive (that’s a good thing!).

It requires a year-round organizing effort to build winning coalitions and campaigns.

**Our success in the midterms is in large part due to the early investments we made in the race. We need to do that again to make sure we win in 2024 and take back control of the House.**

**[If you’re able, can you chip in $15 to support our early organizing efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55759563/382732459/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=9jjNRkyEwDW159CDsgFTEXInv2EU%2FotK3Y3u9g5D7%2BT70wqcX1q6fKrLlYGrFV9QCOReE5Rvj%2B9FCqsp63vz%2BuIyC%2BQqrOEjipfvZ4XAm71SfdSmTRqtNo2%2BqD1OB7Tmt3EX3ZImUNXzC8dUPltN4Q%3D%3D&refcode2=81d1fd40-ee77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221209_FR_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxZmQ0MC1lZTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YL8YSaadkX5ME_o9BXJIxfHBcRKH96Y-Xni5tVD8lS0=)**

Thank you so much,
Dan

* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**

Hi there,

Thanks to you, Dan won last month’s election and will continue serving mid-Michiganders in Congress. Over $20 million was spent on Dan’s district, making it one of the most expensive races across the country. Much of that was by outside dark money super PACs and our self-funding opponent.

Despite running in a newly drawn, competitive district, Dan had a decisive victory. But this didn’t happen by accident—it happened because of grassroots supporters like YOU.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork for the next election. **Because of redistricting, Dan’s district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing, even in the off-year (when Dan isn't on the ballot).**

**[If you’re able, chip in here to support our early Team Kildee organizing efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55759564/382732460/1325829060?amount=15&contactdata=9jjNRkyEwDW159CDsgFTEXInv2EU%2FotK3Y3u9g5D7%2BT70wqcX1q6fKrLlYGrFV9QCOReE5Rvj%2B9FCqsp63vz%2BuIyC%2BQqrOEjipfvZ4XAm71SfdSmTRqtNo2%2BqD1OB7Tmt3EX3ZImUNXzC8dUPltN4Q%3D%3D&refcode2=81d1fd40-ee77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&source=EM_NBI_DK_20221209_FR_1.2_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQxZmQ0MC1lZTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YL8YSaadkX5ME_o9BXJIxfHBcRKH96Y-Xni5tVD8lS0=)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trumptrainnews is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq7o081vqsg5gq479m05boescg952ofk615mg0og_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zedc44egdjj8260rk4r61cgabdrv8bpjskds3tq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5lfb61q2nusfuoccfdgmsrdji11iq2u6k7lujg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmvtrjl4979u70pptvi6ponr918pbmb48jm0kc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztd4e5ce47opr73enn944ka4038jetmiufdi2k00_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6c3h2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6rggriimr6vqeht68glvqcipiemas5aeqn0p60o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6c3h2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcst1kgl3j0ojc9mnookevatfiuq13ne9cnp22bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6c3h2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
**[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd5mub5pk3nj0hmvhgal2khkebebtan4shkslrvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg68or6c3h2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

clean_body: Time is quickly running out. Time is quickly running out. | Friend, I know I’ve been reaching out to you nonstop for the past couple of weeks, but I wanted to let you know that the fight’s not over yet. We’ve still got a lot to fight for before we enter 2023, and it’s as clear as day that the Radical Left’s got a target on my back. They don’t like that I tell it how it is and don’t back down from their crazy Socialist Agenda that makes about as much sense as eating soup with a fork. That’s why I’m counting on patriots like YOU to help me fight back with my crucial Mid-Month deadline just around the corner. | This opportunity doesn’t come around often, and knowing that I have your support would make me happier than a penguin in an ice chest. I know I can count on you to step up and help me hit my FINAL MID-MONTH GOAL before 2023! John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

Peter,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Peter, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Peter, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052247:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052248:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052249:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052250:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052251:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052252:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052253:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052254:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052246:6edd5oGNo:m:1:3331703221:D638E2D1B4B4E5051F8EE9A5A1E0F17A:r)

Thank you, Peter.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation</
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Peter, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Peter. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation</ This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-52308463468-echo7-81706B9FC07D337364EC67003D15B454@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

| | Dear Peter, Thank you so much for being an OLCV supporter. You make our work protecting Oregon’s people and places possible. As the end of the year approaches, I wanted to make sure that you know about Oregon’s Political Tax Credit. **[The State of Oregon gives eligible tax-paying Oregonians a $50 gift ($100 for couples filing jointly) that you can donate to a qualified political group, including OLCV PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55762334/382733883/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZDk3MzZiLWYxNzctZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wM9KZi8TOJ_w89Q_NJ8B-bczRJjbRe2bJamVf4omfPI=&emci=5b50ffcc-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d7d9736b-f177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230) **By contributing today, you can help us continue electing environmental champions and it won’t cost you a dime. You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
* You are an Oregon resident.
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2022.
* You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly).

**[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55762335/382733885/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZDk3MzZiLWYxNzctZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wM9KZi8TOJ_w89Q_NJ8B-bczRJjbRe2bJamVf4omfPI=&emci=5b50ffcc-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d7d9736b-f177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230)** In the 2022 General Election, the message from voters was very clear: we want climate action and we want climate leadership. Because climate voters came out in force this election, Oregon's next governor will be a climate champ and we protected our pro-climate and pro-environment majorities in the state Senate and House. But winning elections is just the first step. We have to continue showing up every election, every legislative session, every day, and demanding action on issues that are important to us. **[Give to OLCV PAC using your Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55762336/382733886/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZDk3MzZiLWYxNzctZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wM9KZi8TOJ_w89Q_NJ8B-bczRJjbRe2bJamVf4omfPI=&emci=5b50ffcc-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d7d9736b-f177-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230)** and ensure that we have the resources we need to continue this important work in 2022 and beyond. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely,
Doug Moore

name: American Action News
subject: Herschel Walker Lost His Election – But Did Republicans Lose The Senate?

name: Kari Lake
subject: We're living in difficult times
body:
Disenfranchised

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm4gg7ru169e6hqi9cduvds21n1eu5b4c9vlf8h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6eor2cph2bs)
---
The people who were disenfranchised, the people who care about their elections, who care about their voice being heard, were given two minutes to speak and air their grievances.

**Meanwhile, these clowns running our elections had two weeks to count the votes.**

God did not put us in this fight because we are weak. We're living in difficult times, and he put the right people here just for this moment.

[**If you are able, can you help us fight back?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zumq052dq52jirssstap51jhu4pa3asajgtsg3l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6eor2cph2bs)

[**Your support is GREATLY APPRECIATED**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvsq150i52e8ne725m2ccia55qu62bvnsto38tr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdg6eor2cph2bs)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: I must tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

Peter,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Peter, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate any amount. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Peter, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052226:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052227:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052228:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052229:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052230:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052231:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052232:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052233:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62052225:Jk0W5oGNZ:m:1:3253819041:E52370240CAF5C95651E1A4ACDAB0293:r)

Thank you, Peter.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJk0W5oGNZ). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJk0W5oGNZ)

The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Peter. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. ---
| | | | The Daily Wire’s Matt Walsh has a lot of great things to say- but this might just be the best thing he’s ever said.

“The 1776 Project PAC claims that it has flipped over 100 school boards since November last year... The argument for pare” **What’s the 1776 Project PAC and why is Matt Walsh talking about them on his show?** You may already know, but my name is Ryan Girdusky, and over the last year, I’ve traveled the country to work with conservative school board candidates who are determined to take back our schools from the crazed radical left. **In ONE YEAR we’ve flipped over 100 school board seats from liberal to conservative!** _AND 60% of ALL the candidates we’ve supported have won their races._ Friend the ONLY way to save our children from leftist indoctrination and Critical Race Theory is to take back our schools, one county at a time. And we’ve proven that, with your support and the support of patriots like you, we CAN and WILL do it. **[Will you chip in take back our schools from the ground up with a donation of $17.76 or more today?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9e97407c59&e=fdefed58de)** For too long our schools have been run by people who hate our country and don’t share our values. Thank you in advance for joining the 1776 Project PAC Team. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky Founder, 1776 Project PAC

name: Primary Sinema
subject: Sinema announced she quit the Democratic Party. A slap in the face.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
| | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q9i8GEkhUjgdBIS4un5J2E5mhi79ZU6qYq-trBRp7cSOwbIfs7vkNfyNH9S5mcAJ1hKZDgKmV2EKr3Vb-ZY16vgge4yJdg0M2vQ7xAMQx2zhM2eo7sCxT9n4xcUjK1p5G4eJRzpsw9USu-1fPJ2KPjZWybtuCrZmmlfODlWp1jMtitAYzadZ_oijX0ybGXFhL3u2PC3sdX8pI4nxcTYJV-jas0_P3SSGG7yH2s3dZfFJKfPUTrAC2k238PrfF8xXMjjVQKLjH-0qktzUM6iy_eo/3ru/jzLxNEBKQGa_Hzezz5f3zQ/h0/YiJRGqT4FGvy9ajfBT6wneZ3no2LgI4J8J2-TG0r9Co)
Peter, In case you haven't seen the news, Kyrsten Sinema has officially left the Democratic Party. She told us what we already knew: she's not a Democrat and she's only out for herself.
As you know, we launched this effort over a year ago in order to lay the groundwork to defeat Kyrsten Sinema. In some ways, our job just got easier. And in other ways, it got tougher. Simply put, this is no longer just about beating Kyrsten Sinema in a primary. Now, we need to prepare for a general election, win a potential three-way race against both Sinema and a Republican -- and make sure that a REAL Democrat represents Arizona. (We'll be changing our name soon.)
But the mission has stayed the same: we're going to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat, because Arizonans deserve a Senator who cares about them, not special interests like Wall Street and Big Pharma.
And we're going to need your help in order to win.
**[If you can, please chip in $5 or any amount you can in order to make sure we have the funds we need to defeat the now Independent Kyrsten Sinema in a general election.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPq80qTbyv4iO0FjVEVs9z7qjYlaXocUTrXJRofViV8S1Cytq-0X1YfVkErV3_m9iaKXSksPAAM3dxNCByKbNh6qT_Nuwu14-DzDAuQg_gCipt0421ZR-bjs-dmR09q0uf3ybYJgn0eXXS7QPQoeTLXdBcAfHDFQXds64KBi9u-bf-mTQFpi5TZxisFiiIK0iFq4JUWHX_QxPO0X1e63JiNUoSE_S_JknFmPSZLPj1Ghua_9_XoTmNX5NVBSRP6qC5FLOMEEnO0NAkY0b73qbe4ZtiBmmMH-YtWkwfX-9LsYXw9jcXK_eF-2nVcqiWP8P2u7mXXtQn1NvOotJfH3fXe4/3ru/jzLxNEBKQGa_Hzezz5f3zQ/h1/26xIBreQVT34miZTluhXEro_6-G1VGt99lBi70r0IFw)** We already knew Sinema didn't care about her constituents or the people who helped elect her, but this is still a slap in the face. Sinema spent years lying about who she was and making phony promises, asking for money and volunteer hours and votes from Democrats.
It's painful. And all the more reason why this effort is more important than ever before. Kyrsten Sinema is only out for herself. Now, we need to deliver for Arizonans and elect a Senator -- a Democratic Senator -- who won't forget where they came from or the people who elected them.
We're going to continue our work holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable. (And we'll let you know soon about our new name.)
**** **[Please chip in if you can to keep our work going >>](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPtj9Z9ro4u70McybMJk_ErEf39w5UDCta7CGNUqust1eF7bZ49TBe0elVGIyr0ZGah8HrH1V2ocgheaRxdm5iZePOJZvmKUFt7PTBprNw796zuu3ZtzZ7QLybABnaM29OzlR4crtwKAUe_LDoCB_i5iltYv__rAtjB2jd4OxVlnr-dq6aVE02Cjrrc4IzamSX4s0juLEaqxIB7dSYiO26pdwKUn3x3_4vXDM8HbhCZi7tdlBtQoVQtGFHR1h4IC8AE4vLJqddndXD8gab2QyowgrVPNfFtSY1P2AWImNizR70tbAh_bJaJxpTWWPIXvYT0w-mFa3O4VTEKZrPWrnI3A/3ru/jzLxNEBKQGa_Hzezz5f3zQ/h2/JhqDBZcg_BdC8hmguxDSEVkW1Ba3NqppdnQddY91qss)** [CHIP IN](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPrbhh3jppxMPmxX-x4YHdL9pnHSRHKh0353FWwucjf3fFFYOUo3RM7guwOhqtki3aRTZgUccs0kGFe0D1mLECZu7Q7N8Q7SSVcE2opIk2LvZEE_E2deDRyHZz-nwkP62E1rEOa_rNUqMlfM-WI8H8EFnFGhgAQZ_VJk9gKrI5bADLRg1iEXpMhapRKtMooIPzmgdDkA3Ti7a-59rPGJ7L4jwvJ_BNwCz3eUpxgulfyvkUuHfp5X8_1xIeZnl6celr6PBQPnAIHOUjQvRpT7yxQEOQE-QQ1xOaoT1Y2puEy97Z-lIYtIn_-AsFs-EBrYcxWR1ACTKvd_bO9zMjpsoNB0/3ru/jzLxNEBKQGa_Hzezz5f3zQ/h3/ooUG6ua5_wQXdUHs7arunR9gIiNIrEEHOUT7DV7J9iE) Thanks for sticking with us, \--The team at Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

And all the more reason why this effort is more important than ever before. Kyrsten Sinema is only out for herself. Now, we need to deliver for Arizonans and elect a Senator -- a Democratic Senator -- who won't forget where they came from or the people who elected them. We're going to continue our work holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable. (And we'll let you know soon about our new name.) ** Thanks for sticking with us, \--The team at Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . subject: There is a direct connection between the donations we ask you to make and gun laws that save lives. So please, give generously today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Donation —> Change —> Lives Saved.
#

Friends -
This holiday season, there are people who are still alive today because of the lifesaving gun laws we’ve helped pass in states across the country.
It could be a mom able to celebrate the holidays with her kids because an abusive ex with a restraining order was not able to get his hands on a gun during a fit of rage.
It could be a person who thought of harming themselves, but a waiting period stopped the impulsive purchase and gave them time to get help.
The point is, our work saves lives.
And there is a direct connection between the donations we ask you to make that funds our work, to the laws passed that make us safer, to the lives saved as a result.
They go hand in hand. But it starts with you, right now. So please:
[**Can you choose to use this link today and make a contribution of $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Giffords PAC? The decision to donate is a lifesaving one, so please give what you can. subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:

Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zavjb5eai88er0rsesgspbiahfb26brem616qgvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfv6m2usjn45tttkjo2et54sl7todlg85l60sq40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0t8inatj327utiirgl3al43uuiroonpc52pps28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl6bemqg5nc3pf47jjcv5q1kqqae7jtu4qhtgst8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqeqlqhto67foeis4he4qh474bo0r6m3acskpt30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9037s77tut0ulkmktpft0ueelj2sf3clk8cp830_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdi64pr4s1h2bs)

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking. Thank you! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th. body:
What pro-worker policies would most change your life for the better?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768013/382739278/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)
**Did you catch my message last week, Peter?**
We are so grateful for the supporters who have shared their pro-worker stories with us so far and wanted to make sure you have the opportunity to share as well!
Stories are a powerful and effective tool which help get legislation passed because they connect ideas to real people — making policies tangible and urgent.
We still need to hear from you, Peter! [_**Will you share your story with us today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768014/382739279/-62369414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)
We look forward to hearing from you!
— Tara
P.S. I've included my original message below:
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tara, Team Casar [info@casarforcongress.com]
Date: Thur, Dec 1, 2022 at 6:13 PM
Subject: Tell us first-hand
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com_
**Across the nation, we are seeing a resurgence in labor rights and union power!**
From Starbucks baristas, to rail workers, to health care workers, everyone deserves a safe and healthy workplace and fair wages. That's why when Greg served on the Austin City Council, he spearheaded initiatives for paid sick leave, a $15 to $20 an hour minimum wage, and worker protections.
Now, Peter, Greg aims to be the most pro-labor member of Congress. That means both filing legislation and pushing the Administration to implement pro-worker policies now to help working families.
**Some of the most powerful tools we can use to win these policies are real-world stories from folks like you.**
[_**Will you take a few minutes to share your worker story with our team? Your first-hand experience will help us understand what legislation is needed right now to help working families in Texas and across the country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768015/382739280/-62369414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)
**[Share Your Story »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768016/382739281/-62369414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)**
---
**Some questions to consider:**
* _What pro-worker policies would most change your life for the better?_
* _Let's talk about retirement— at what age are you planning on retiring, or at what age did you retire? How important are Social Security and strong pensions to you?_
* _What other workplace issues are important to you, like health care, decent benefits, and the right to a union?_

Greg will sign onto bills immediately that give all workers the right to organize a union, to guarantee universal healthcare, to protect Social Security, and to raise wages. But he's also committed to pushing the Administration to implement strong policies that give more people overtime pay in exchange for their long hours and to put in place stronger occupational health and safety rules.
[**Share your experience with us so we can show Congress that there are real people who are affected more and more each day that we delay passing these critical policies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768017/382739282/-207773751?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)
Economic fairness should be at the core of our democracy. We won't give up until we achieve it.
— Tara
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55768018/382739283/-62369414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWNkZmI0Yy1mNjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kaf2x1iGzOowA6bE6wmdpxXd3nsu5Snb0XOuVh4zxXY=&emci=f00ef52a-ef77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=79cdfb4c-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6830379)

clean_body: What pro-worker policies would most change your life for the better? Did you catch my message last week, Peter? We are so grateful for the supporters who have shared their pro-worker stories with us so far and wanted to make sure you have the opportunity to share as well! Stories are a powerful and effective tool which help get legislation passed because they connect ideas to real people — making policies tangible and urgent. We still need to hear from you, Peter! We look forward to hearing from you! — Tara P.S. I've included my original message below: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tara, Team Casar [info@casarforcongress.com] Date: Thur, Dec 1, 2022 at 6:13 PM Subject: Tell us first-hand To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Across the nation, we are seeing a resurgence in labor rights and union power! From Starbucks baristas, to rail workers, to health care workers, everyone deserves a safe and healthy workplace and fair wages. That's why when Greg served on the Austin City Council, he spearheaded initiatives for paid sick leave, a $15 to $20 an hour minimum wage, and worker protections. Now, Peter, Greg aims to be the most pro-labor member of Congress. That means both filing legislation and pushing the Administration to implement pro-worker policies now to help working families. Some of the most powerful tools we can use to win these policies are real-world stories from folks like you. Some questions to consider: What pro-worker policies would most change your life for the better? Let's talk about retirement— at what age are you planning on retiring, or at what age did you retire? How important are Social Security and strong pensions to you? What other workplace issues are important to you, like health care, decent benefits, and the right to a union? Greg will sign onto bills immediately that give all workers the right to organize a union, to guarantee universal healthcare, to protect Social Security, and to raise wages. But he's also committed to pushing the Administration to implement strong policies that give more people overtime pay in exchange for their long hours and to put in place stronger occupational health and safety rules. Economic fairness should be at the core of our democracy. We won't give up until we achieve it. — Tara Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director **= | ** ---|---
