name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7596%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Klj5rjO%2fIc8jlwjl6C3Nzg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96825%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uCD93BCPqRrwhNbrFV1jHg&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96826%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xDLNC5JwePw5rqdJJulU0g&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96827%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xrc3Q6WO%2fz87H0lbqW%2blpA&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96828%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qY6xj9lG2hLPbjEwvrUtTQ&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96829%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=76y%2f%2fYZfOjGMRu5ahhYP6A&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96820%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6D5rGNHMB3J4q5IeG4zEuA&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96821%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TYX4okC3t6ECEP6mCWkMlA&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96822%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V%2f5%2bKOTF3HmySXFCJSM%2fiA&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96823%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VnJf881mFKhzm8f5SMbhqA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96824%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AyIFPSyotIESKdwawJ5Aw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96835%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sk6iQKk7s%2bBu%2bYmaOaDdzg&sysid=1)

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Donald Trump announced that he’s running for President in 2024. 2\. Democrats lost the House – which means Republicans will be the Majority in the new Congress. 3\. [Now Trump’s right hand man Kevin McCarthy is alluding his plans to investigate the January 6th Committee and it’s members [!!]]() This is just another trick from Kevin McCarthy’s MAGA playbook to save himself from his own incriminating phone calls that he made on January 6th. Here's what the new Senate landscape means for Dems... | | | Hi Peter, With Sen. Warnock's victory over Herschel Walker, the Senate will remain under Democratic control: 51-49. This is a HUGE victory for Democrats, and we'll break down why. **[First, we want to ask – will you consider chipping in whatever you are able to make sure that we can keep Republicans at bay and hold on to our wins from 2022?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcLPkxQx4aWNZdpGk0pvsPtlcPjrYIujy_PrzON-9rh5hFYIGpIrVJon9LgJ4PmkG0-FgzueDoZ47lOtIa4-zQPBf4kt8NIcE8BZDaqe_s_PWKvYTAwSLEbtjyLgt9uvamajQLOezmN-8pyZv31mD_03EV3XuXwX0-tf5EeMesZerdYrinGNs5pwORV9gCXzC9lvVJFMcV1DeWdBAPLTU4TGRUgYhQWLhRUjWkM0Oglk4joHk8-JGn0v3yhWsxLUdGTvwtTmuEgnZVb9XlyJ1e__ZKYglGjI2fX5HQDBy5rfk/3ru/l-U8mOJYRwW0U9BZME_g3g/h0/XJu6HtoNxyt3WxPB-GFSpyCUkvHpR_SXKXobrS1mquI)** **[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcLPkxQx4aWNZdpGk0pvsPtlcPjrYIujy_PrzON-9rh5hSOVi5O24UxUhxF54h6NqCn_ThmMVNqIHV9RvkMl9bm3EazE1xpuF-9D3u-UuqJoUBSjpOxmAzYx2Z4gkJF9E8EO2b0TIx22ilvTn2gXSQl6N-XG-IqQiCZPemFMkUKkIQJ-XcnrONQYGKF0KddRkiRmSd8cFzATMPyfiKkfpW9QHBrLekePw6cOCcEfLCdrRdASE9gZwScDNlNc5UEhS78grOfoH4ww17csFqnBnmqhjyDnvrgVzCVXJCXv38uFc/3ru/l-U8mOJYRwW0U9BZME_g3g/h1/Z1EpM-5aogJ2pNGkQwrtmdVHupL_M7mjOh8cJN2VUk8)** You might not think that a 50-50 or 51-49 Senate makes that much of a difference. On the surface, both allow Democrats to remain in control of the chamber. But Sen. Warnock's win gives Democrats some clear advantages, which is why it was so crucial that he beat his GOP opponent. Under a 51-49 Democratic-controlled Senate, Democrats will be able to:
1. **Remain solidly in control of Senate committees.** In a 50-50 Senate, Democrats would have had to evenly split committee members. Now, they will be able to pass more legislation without worrying about Republican partisan delays.
2. **Appoint more progressive judges to federal courts.** Under this Senate, Democrats will be able to hold off any stalling tactics from Republicans and be less reliant on gaining a consensus from more moderate members of the Democratic Party on judge confirmations, including Supreme Court justices.
3. **Carry forward a message of Democratic strength.** With a solid Democratic majority, Sen. Warnock's win conveys to Americans that voters want Democrats in power, which will also help the party in the 2024 elections.

Our organization is proud to have endorsed many Democratic Senate candidates this election and drive thousands of dollars to them through our digital program. [**We won't stop - chip in to make sure we can continue this work around the clock.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcLPkxQx4aWNZdpGk0pvsPtlcPjrYIujy_PrzON-9rh5hvZrU_f78te8fmAxO44hTEIPJ_B10BgxsOZMnrjdAsV3MAsIevAiDlHOcaZhYIyBNI-ymkF0FpFoVhvbB9-4ng6bY3LvrS3VDDZUKFlG-6TekmsaBqQspeufwoOalsAX_rUGrk3o4MCvO8Y6koKa9SS6sH3S-Kuq_u51t3Cq7IbHSRgUizsRgvyrM68EZVttgPIGMKfx2wm4DLC1anvC0Oqjc3pzGAft3GioZ9e63drS_zFaOcsQu9h_hLb8shb_c/3ru/l-U8mOJYRwW0U9BZME_g3g/h2/t3mBqKLgMeHTl6IAgjzJNmQsjMMVNZVatd_RHBDmpCM) **Thank you for helping our organization lift up rural Democrats and keep the Democratic majority alive.** – United Rural Democrats HQ

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: The Respect for Marriage Act is long overdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, With the official vote yesterday, this is a time of celebration because the U.S. Congress - with the help of Congressmen André Carson and Frank Mrvan - codified the right to marry who you love. America is now another step forward in being a more perfect union. It was well past time that our federal government recognizes the validity of same-sex and interracial marriages in our country. And regardless of the timeline, we’re grateful that our Democratic leaders are taking action to protect same sex and interracial couples under the law by passing the Respect for Marriage Act. This legislation is just one example of the work that Democrats are doing to build a safer, more equitable country, and we need to support that work however we can. [**Donate to the Indiana Democratic Party today, and help us unseat Republican politicians who don’t have our best interests at heart.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55743831/382684895/1643342139?refcode=221209-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2ZiYzUyMy1kMjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGWVVPQ8TbS3Ex6ma67YNdTarxG001NPXGixywhQoCU=) **Republican lawmakers are seeking to divide us and make political headway by focusing on culture war issues and by depriving basic rights to members of our community.** We are the party of progress, and we need to continue to support our lawmakers at the state and federal level, as they advocate for our rights each and every day. We have the opportunity, right here in Indiana, to make significant progress on every important issue by electing Democrats at the municipal level in 2023. [**Chip in today, and help us elect leaders in the Hoosier state who will protect our community and fight for our rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55743832/382684896/1643342139?refcode=221209-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2ZiYzUyMy1kMjc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGWVVPQ8TbS3Ex6ma67YNdTarxG001NPXGixywhQoCU=) Thanks,

I’m honored to endorse him in this race. But Republicans are desperate to defend this seat, and Aaron needs the resources to fight back. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make an urgent contribution of $25 to Defense Dem PAC to elect Aaron and defend our Democratic values. Democrats currently only hold a tight three-seat majority in the Virginia State Senate. So, we can't afford to sit out of any opportunities to flip a seat from red to blue if we want to defend our shared values. That's why I need your help to flip Jen Kiggans’ open state Senate seat and elect my friend, Democrat Aaron Rouse, on January 10th. Aaron is an award-winning community leader, nonprofit founder, city councilman, and a tireless advocate for Virginia families. I’m honored to endorse him in this race. But Republicans are desperate to defend this seat, and Aaron needs the resources to fight back. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I can’t thank you enough, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: ARMY vs. NAVY - An American Tradition 🇺🇸
body:
It's the 123rd meeting of these academy rivals... see you in the stands! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c6e5d894ddb9/army-vs-navy-an-american-tradition?e=0e0cd0261a)
---
# Friends,
Many of you know that I’m a big college football fan. Nothing is better than rooting for "your" team on a Saturday afternoon in the fall! My oldest son, Logan, and I graduated from Furman University, a small school in South Carolina, and our team lost 41-38 last Saturday in the second round of the FCS playoffs—it was crushing.Yesterday, my wife, Melisa, and I arrived in Philadelphia to attend another college football game this weekend—the Army-Navy game. This game has special meaning to our family. Our middle son, Parker, graduated from the Naval Academy in 2019 and is currently serving on active duty. Our youngest son, Duncan, is a senior at West Point and graduates in May. This trip marks the seventh year that Missi and I have gone to see the two academies play.

Every year, we get asked, “which team do you root for?” Several years ago, I solved that problem by getting custom baseball hats embroidered with both Academy logos and the phrase, “House Divided” written underneath. On the back, it simply reads, “Beat Air Force.”
This Saturday, December 10, the U.S. Military Academy at West Point and the U.S. Naval Academy will meet on the gridiron for the 123rd time. A game that’s steeped in tradition, one of my favorites is who sings last.Every year at the end of the game, players sing both teams' alma maters. The winning team joins the losing team and sings facing the losing team's students. Then the losing team joins the victors on their side of the field and sings the winner's alma mater to its students. This act is a show of mutual respect and solidarity. That’s why you’ll see signs in the stand that read “Sing second.”Above all else, this is America's game. All of the cadets and midshipmen in the stands and on the field understand their commitment to their country regardless of the game’s outcome. After the last whistle blows, it doesn’t matter which team is victorious on the field—America wins either way.If you have a bucket list, add attending this game to it! And if you have time tomorrow, take a moment to learn about the traditions of this great American event. If you do tune in and look closely, you may spot us—we’ll be the ones shivering in the stands cheering for a tie! 🇺🇸
|
---

name: VoteVets
subject: Supporting Veterans and Military families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets was formed in 2006 to help amplify the voices of Veterans and Military families in the legislative debates of our time.
#
Derek -
We talk A LOT about our political work. It’s important. Nothing less than the future of our country and the democracy many of us signed up to defend is on the line.
But that is not all we do. Not even close.
VoteVets was formed in 2006 to help amplify the voices of Veterans and Military families in the legislative debates of our time.
We’ve relentlessly fought Republican attempts to privatize the VA.
We’ve fought against cuts to food stamps programs used by Veterans and Military families.
We’ve defended the jobs of Veterans in the postal service and fishing industry.
We’ve joined forces with unlikely allies to stop the Endless Wars.
Recently, we worked to help pass the PACT Act in Congress.
The list is endless, honestly. Even though it can be overshadowed at times by the political work.
But that work for Veterans and Military families doesn’t happen without you either. Donations fund that work — the lobbying, the ads, the flying Veterans out to take to Capitol Hill.
So we’re asking:

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I’m back!
body:
Yesterday morning, I was notified that Twitter reinstated my Twitter account with over 250,000 followers. | | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vRkGIxpfWcxs1Dtw8sOhYw/892a8KKf3oBT4rx79892vUNLXw) | Dear Friend,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vRkGIxpfWcxs1Dtw8sOhYw/892a8KKf3oBT4rx79892vUNLXw) Yesterday morning, I was notified that Twitter reinstated my Twitter account with over 250,000 followers.

In late 2018, over 4 years ago, I was permanently banned from Twitter after tweeting that Ilhan Omar was "anti-Jewish." As more revelations come out about Twitter's political censorship and their coordinated effort to curate political information, I'm confident that I will be vindicated once again.

**That 's why, despite the reinstatement of my account, I WILL NOT drop my RICO case against Twitter and Facebook.**

I will always keep fighting!

But your help is needed to keep my case going. [**If you make a donation today of $50 or more, I 'll send you a signed copy of my new book, _LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World._**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vRkGIxpfWcxs1Dtw8sOhYw/892a8KKf3oBT4rx79892vUNLXw)

My book also makes a great gift for friends and family this holiday season.

If you already have my book, and you would still like to support my lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia, [**any donation amount is GREATLY appreciated!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vRkGIxpfWcxs1Dtw8sOhYw/892a8KKf3oBT4rx79892vUNLXw)

Please donate today so we can hold the Big Tech Mafia accountable for their political censorship and election interference - or they'll do it all over again as we head into the 2024 elections!

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. You can follow me on Twitter [here!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/W1Suhv8DMsWoJXcnothGVQ/892a8KKf3oBT4rx79892vUNLXw)
---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

New York is a big state, but most people don’t often look outside of the five boroughs that make up New York City. The New York State Young Democrats are thrilled to have the opportunity to welcome Young Democrats from across the country to show you the cornerstone of Western New York. From December 9 - 11, the Young Democrats of America will get the full experience of the vibrant and lively city that is Buffalo, New York. The home of Governor Kathy Hochul, the Starbucks Workers United union, and the future Super Bowl Champions, the Buffalo Bills. Our programming will focus on how the Labor Movement built this nation and keeps it running. Since World War II, unions have moved beyond their traditional roles of collective bargaining and representation to a more community-oriented mission of improving the quality of local jobs and the communities they live in. As the home to more than 200 labor unions including the newly formed Starbuck Workers United, Buffalo is a labor town! Since 2003, Buffalo’s union density and representation has ranked in the top 15 in the United States. [We hope that you can support us as we continue to show that the Democratic Party is the party of the Unions and the Working Class. When you invest in us, this is what you are investing in: the organization going out there and doing the work. This is the future of the Democratic Party. So are you in? Pitch in $10, $25, or even $100 now to help us continue the work we’re doing.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYy7NOMUEtKirBuN62eN2htv8s6EgJgcReuifK7HzB-B_XUZENfigUxpiFd4i0-UGQ3w7D6gteHyo1zKMCO54DeJ-HUHifcnNKbWRPMU5zs1BMygIB67AZELPFpRCzo_m0NB-ur57L1fmncCIQ6RuDxCOKqLnkZflYqzsC7rD-YE9_v3n3IzW1jRFW9zIBB_zrKjKTUqhQ4urG5H1aw0gwKRARLGWRjfQGRecKkdhxXbS_27widHxotbyMd4QQ4e8irLyIVF5x3esz16NZhU6wdcgSImftuWBGNyeHmwAZEwvqiLAJWo-u2OCLu8sk_IdQ2SD6qDmCxwAPNQlNNfe1WFxitz6TI0Z2MRC6usPc6Q/3ru/Ed7kiNlLQyii7NUvab8l3Q/h3/HDDpNcbvww0IbCTsRnfig-kgBYRXXVXzL-sSxStGJww)

clean_body: Show your solidarity by giving today | | Folks- As we celebrate the Georgia runoff win, our work is now over. As we speak, Young Democrats from around the country are converging on Buffalo, NY for our National Committee meeting. We're here in Buffalo because we wanted to show our solidarity for Labor in a Union Town. | New York is a big state, but most people don’t often look outside of the five boroughs that make up New York City. The New York State Young Democrats are thrilled to have the opportunity to welcome Young Democrats from across the country to show you the cornerstone of Western New York. From December 9 - 11, the Young Democrats of America will get the full experience of the vibrant and lively city that is Buffalo, New York. The home of Governor Kathy Hochul, the Starbucks Workers United union, and the future Super Bowl Champions, the Buffalo Bills. Our programming will focus on how the Labor Movement built this nation and keeps it running. Since World War II, unions have moved beyond their traditional roles of collective bargaining and representation to a more community-oriented mission of improving the quality of local jobs and the communities they live in. As the home to more than 200 labor unions including the newly formed Starbuck Workers United, Buffalo is a labor town! Since 2003, Buffalo’s union density and representation has ranked in the top 15 in the United States. In solidarity, Jovan Richards President, New York State Young Democrats | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Earlier this week, our pressure campaign
pushed the House to reject Joe Manchin's Dirty Deal from the National
Defense Authorization Act — but the West Virginia coal baron and the
fossil fuel lobbyists aren't giving up.

Now, the fight has moved to the Senate, where Democratic leadership is
trying to attach this disastrous giveaway to polluters to the NDAA. We can
win again — but we need to take action immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?source=OR_EM_EN_30SP_20221208_1_1&t=1011&akid=3821%2E5885482%2EgDCIos ]Click here to call your Senator and urge them to reject Joe Manchin's
Dirty Deal.

Our Revolution's targeted campaign helped kill Manchin's dirty deal in
September, and our members made thousands of calls pressuring lawmakers.

With lobbyists rushing to convince Democratic Senators to back the dirty

clean_body: We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023. | | | | | We can’t believe it: Over 1,675 Democrats have already renewed their 2023 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. Does this look right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 This year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking one more time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Thank you so much. I really mean that.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHwjPjeJW/VjJaa2hWbHA4QW1yOXJBVmxWckZvbUV4TmhtbVRsdkdhZVdDZitSUi95ZFdTR0lMQUhsU0toMHIzQi9FL0xmbEYwVDhEd3ZCeHVJTE04VDJDRllpRkUyRzQwTGRQVHNSY2ZENnpGRXRyRkE9S0/M3A1UkdZN1VvcFZMbHlQSFZBQVZ3NjJyYzJkWUtROUFOL2hyZ3FEaEx4Zz0S1) Friend -- In just hours, our campaign's fundraising apparatus will be as frozen as a block of ice. Throughout Washington state's legislative session this winter, we won't be able to raise even a penny to fight for the progressive future of our state -- _even as far-right groups raise and spend millions._ **And, right now, I 'm alarmed to share that we're still $4,032 short of our $50,000 Beat The Freeze fundraising goal.** [_**Time 's running out. Please, will you chip in $10 before midnight so we can reach this goal together?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMxPYPpQY/VjJaa2hWbHA4QW1yOXJBVmxWckZvbUV4TmhtbVRsdkdhZVdDZitSUi95ZFdTR0lMQUhsU0toMHIzQi9FL0xmbEYwVDhEd3ZCeHVJTE04VDJDRllpRkUyRzQwTGRQVHNSY2ZENnpGRXRyRkE9S0/M3A1UkdZN1VvcFZMbHlQSFZBQVZ3NjJyYzJkWUtROUFOL2hyZ3FEaEx4Zz0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMxPYPpQY/VjJaa2hWbHA4QW1yOXJBVmxWckZvbUV4TmhtbVRsdkdhZVdDZitSUi95ZFdTR0lMQUhsU0toMHIzQi9FL0xmbEYwVDhEd3ZCeHVJTE04VDJDRllpRkUyRzQwTGRQVHNSY2ZENnpGRXRyRkE9S0/M3A1UkdZN1VvcFZMbHlQSFZBQVZ3NjJyYzJkWUtROUFOL2hyZ3FEaEx4Zz0S1) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhbvGv0Sj/VjJaa2hWbHA4QW1yOXJBVmxWckZvbUV4TmhtbVRsdkdhZVdDZitSUi95ZFdTR0lMQUhsU0toMHIzQi9FL0xmbEYwVDhEd3ZCeHVJTE04VDJDRllpRkUyRzQwTGRQVHNSY2ZENnpGRXRyRkE9S0/M3A1UkdZN1VvcFZMbHlQSFZBQVZ3NjJyYzJkWUtROUFOL2hyZ3FEaEx4Zz0S1)
---
Can I take a minute to remind both of us what's at stake? This legislative session, we need to codify the right to abortion into our constitution. We need to continue our bold fight against the climate crisis. And we need to tackle our twin housing and mental health crises.
But while our fundraising is frozen, far-right special interest groups -- Big Oil and anti-choice organizations included -- can continue raising and spending millions to try and block our progress at every turn.
This $50,000 goal exists so when they attack us, our communities, our values, and our rights (and they will!), we can fight back.
We're so close to hitting this goal. I know, with your support, we can reach this goal before midnight.
[_**So I 'm humbly asking: Will you please chip in $10 right now?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMxPYPpQY/VjJaa2hWbHA4QW1yOXJBVmxWckZvbUV4TmhtbVRsdkdhZVdDZitSUi95ZFdTR0lMQUhsU0toMHIzQi9FL0xmbEYwVDhEd3ZCeHVJTE04VDJDRllpRkUyRzQwTGRQVHNSY2ZENnpGRXRyRkE9S0/M3A1UkdZN1VvcFZMbHlQSFZBQVZ3NjJyYzJkWUtROUFOL2hyZ3FEaEx4Zz0S1)

clean_body: Thank you so much. I really mean that. | Friend -- In just hours, our campaign's fundraising apparatus will be as frozen as a block of ice. Throughout Washington state's legislative session this winter, we won't be able to raise even a penny to fight for the progressive future of our state -- even as far-right groups raise and spend millions. And, right now, I 'm alarmed to share that we're still $4,032 short of our $50,000 Beat The Freeze fundraising goal. | Can I take a minute to remind both of us what's at stake? This legislative session, we need to codify the right to abortion into our constitution. We need to continue our bold fight against the climate crisis. And we need to tackle our twin housing and mental health crises. But while our fundraising is frozen, far-right special interest groups -- Big Oil and anti-choice organizations included -- can continue raising and spending millions to try and block our progress at every turn. This $50,000 goal exists so when they attack us, our communities, our values, and our rights (and they will!), we can fight back. We're so close to hitting this goal. I know, with your support, we can reach this goal before midnight. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. I really mean that. Very truly yours, Jay

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Winning in California
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
| | In California, I was proud to endorse Reps. Michelle Steel and Young Kim, two incredible female leaders who made history in 2020 when they flipped their blue seats red.
---
|
---
| | This year, they won reelection and I’m thrilled to see the great work they’ll continue to do. Here’s a little bit more about these two leaders. **Michelle Steel: CA-45 ** As an immigrant from South Korea, Michelle Steel knows the hope and opportunity America has to offer. Since her historic victory in 2020, Michelle has been a strong voice in Congress who looks out for the best interests of the American people. She has worked tirelessly to advocate for policies that will make life easier and more affordable. In 2020, Michelle Steel flipped her competitive district red, defeating her opponent by 3 points. This year, she faced another tough fight and an onslaught of million-dollar attacks, but she came out on top. **Young Kim: CA-40 **As an immigrant, mother, and small business owner, Young Kim has lived the American Dream. After she flipped her seat by just one point in 2020, Young Kim served her community by fighting for job growth, supporting small businesses, and promoting educational opportunities. This year, Young Kim won reelection and is ready to continue the work she started. I’m proud to have endorsed these bold, conservative women and know they’ll continue to do great things in Congress. My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=041d1d50166a4b4eacc05494f0a1f21c&_e=9fGcNeGsU0FJO3SKf1XOLNnMwRbDvXOpfTQ5L5U-ycsqdeb8i7v7l4ku_Z1-5m6Tn0oBoY2IwnDDMJ3gHr9Myp8ffsuwTez1eJlBS7imsirlFYn9ORWw4MlMlgGkGf9HAGU8uS0i1seHLgT8amYmx3ZVGLcpD1gghJaLlMHJlTYkwb8xc6Q7kgEnnBW7RtT8wZrVmJvueWKJqvm07o4JYjKUgaI0y9GbYGM23aPuDK6B8Cl3JeBPx3rB3rb972nqoM5vrGmu-a7rYOXK7JMkc6QYfLxns_e6abqWhc9wJOPhnKBOCn9Y8sPImmv2ObcHn1J2L9l8vx4s5P1bxrOspEsOKaZunNVhGZ-totThfhMho_hhwVWXTob3XhpwnhqzceYDDWgaSkabYZ1EOk5jVg%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Friend, | | In California, I was proud to endorse Reps. Michelle Steel and Young Kim, two incredible female leaders who made history in 2020 when they flipped their blue seats red. | | | This year, they won reelection and I’m thrilled to see the great work they’ll continue to do. Here’s a little bit more about these two leaders. Michelle Steel: CA-45 As an immigrant from South Korea, Michelle Steel knows the hope and opportunity America has to offer. Since her historic victory in 2020, Michelle has been a strong voice in Congress who looks out for the best interests of the American people. She has worked tirelessly to advocate for policies that will make life easier and more affordable. In 2020, Michelle Steel flipped her competitive district red, defeating her opponent by 3 points. This year, she faced another tough fight and an onslaught of million-dollar attacks, but she came out on top. Young Kim: CA-40 As an immigrant, mother, and small business owner, Young Kim has lived the American Dream. After she flipped her seat by just one point in 2020, Young Kim served her community by fighting for job growth, supporting small businesses, and promoting educational opportunities. This year, Young Kim won reelection and is ready to continue the work she started. I’m proud to have endorsed these bold, conservative women and know they’ll continue to do great things in Congress. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. | | It’s no secret that early voter turnout was crucial in the Runoff Election. Together, we broke down barriers to voting and empowered voters to make their voices heard at the ballot box: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55772175/382752855/229504096?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221209_f_turnout_v2s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE2NjU2YS0wNTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBg0lj_fFQ3PxpKaJ0-I90QKlDQaTNwqmo219HxKFFY=) Georgia voters had to overcome obstacles they never should have been forced to face. They showed up and showed out, despite Georgia’s voter suppression law, SB 202, that took away **more than two-thirds** of voters’ mandatory early vote access and cut the total Runoff period in **more than half.** Despite these obstacles, we were able to translate your support into tangible resources to get out the vote across Georgia for this important Runoff Election. This huge early voting turnout is a testament to the impact of our work to push back against voter suppression and build voter power in Georgia. **Our mobilization efforts continue to pay off, and we’re sending a clear message that our voices won’t be silenced. ** As we reflect on all our accomplishments this year and look towards the work that lies ahead, we’re building up our resources to continue expanding the freedom to vote — before, during, and after election cycles. Thank you so much, Fair Fight Action | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55772176/382752856/229504096?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20221209_f_turnout_v2s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGE2NjU2YS0wNTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBg0lj_fFQ3PxpKaJ0-I90QKlDQaTNwqmo219HxKFFY=)

Peter, Senator-elect Katie Britt has been an outspoken critic of TikTok and the national security threat it poses to our country and our children. The Biden Administration has stalled in taking any action to stop this dangerous app from preying on our children, and their inaction has prompted outrage. Now, more Republicans and even some Democrats are speaking out more fervently against the app, saying that it is a “massive surveillance” tool, a “threat to the United States National Security” by China, and a “danger” to our children. The Biden Administration continues to ignore the problem, and Katie knows Congress must hold Biden accountable.
We’ve opened an official survey so Katie knows where you stand on the issue and we need your response by 11:59 pm tonight. As a **_momma on a mission_** to protect our kids, Katie won’t stop until their future is secure. [_**Do you agree that TikTok is a risk to our national security & our kids' safety and should be banned here in the U.S.?**_](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=cb2c8c2ef4cd467c9912f554076d397a&_e=tA5256hRnd44h7qs5udL-SO4ZMBkAUxrFiiQthg1qWhigmjnzR6ZK_APqic67cETb5OI0mwr66gH4ADMWeXF0gsndzy1HGrRYGyafSH1-m7R1SSZewrIzk5NdOyDxc_W3UzvUdjxDzvFmpUlAhjFcL4eTJZVREQVBN7yUKdFLFFjRxh0215bMWFSyy-FzRXJEVkW0WqBppxAKbvlkJjcEleL-8GE_hLtKFbgB2FgX4JLp0KrY_00ghaSqRRJeefPqZNjkBRJnh019ts-L0O6_ExSGEFetlzwTdrBDTrKPdXx1i9HGEo0g7TUrqwGZhjrbrUBVYc9z21VGsXdnsIlUbEAZAKkjHFwqccd0pg_U_GfAr23qXPBGQVeFtKbCz5H0Qv53vE6LOQHdD58dJfzfQnHKB9iGFcJfofAxt34UbWELIYmc3UwBpxExcVRHZvb)

Now, more Republicans and even some Democrats are speaking out more fervently against the app, saying that it is a “massive surveillance” tool, a “threat to the United States National Security” by China, and a “danger” to our children. The Biden Administration continues to ignore the problem, and Katie knows Congress must hold Biden accountable. We’ve opened an official survey so Katie knows where you stand on the issue and we need your response by 11:59 pm tonight. As a momma on a mission to protect our kids, Katie won’t stop until their future is secure. Thank you, Team Britt for Alabama | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

body:
We have a lot to celebrate from this week!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55772813/382755432/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221209GeorgiaRecap_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZjczMmMxLTA5NzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q7mBMjQzLSuUjsNKT45Dl4uFo4107s6EfCfIxHcL2w0=)
| Fellow activist,

We have a lot to celebrate, and a lot to thank you for today.

First, we want to start here at home, and celebrate the swearing-in of New Pennsylvania Project board member Joanna McClinton as Pennsylvania’s House Majority Leader!

Second, as you’re no doubt aware, **Senator Warnock won, and we have secured an expanded majority in the U.S. Senate.**

Third, thanks to your support, we were able to send our organizers down to Georgia and assist the New Georgia Project in knocking _**more than 800,000 doors for the runoff election!**_

Considering Senator Warnock won by less than 100,000 votes, it’s not hard to consider how different the results would look without those 800,000 doors we helped the New Georgia Project knock.

**[Fellow activist, these huge wins are yet more proof of the rewards that come from expanding the electorate — and our part in winning these neck-and-neck races is all thanks to this grassroots team. Will you start a recurring contribution right now to help us continue this crucial work through the slow fundraising months ahead, so we can deliver even more in the years to come?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55772814/382755433/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221209GeorgiaRecap_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_L1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZjczMmMxLTA5NzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q7mBMjQzLSuUjsNKT45Dl4uFo4107s6EfCfIxHcL2w0=)** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55772815/382755434/-1069438538?refcode=EM_C_221209GeorgiaRecap_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_B1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZjczMmMxLTA5NzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q7mBMjQzLSuUjsNKT45Dl4uFo4107s6EfCfIxHcL2w0=) By the way — as with any good travel story, we took pictures!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: The U.S. must take accountability for driving global climate disasters
body:
Add your name
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Climate change-driven catastrophes continue to increase in frequency and intensity, and they directly impact countries with little to no responsibility for the emissions causing this. In other words, many countries pay to clean up the disasters they did not help create. [**Sign the petition: The U.S. must take accountability for driving climate disaster around the world.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dc2819a-6254-4681-b59e-689b85aef9b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Just this summer, Pakistan experienced [devastating climate-driven floods](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te23943e4-3cb0-4269-86fa-c818f0b6bb06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) leaving millions displaced and causing over $100 billion in unforeseen infrastructure damage. Pakistan emits less than 1% of total global emissions. But countries like the U.S. are the largest historical emitters of carbon dioxide. The United States emits [14% of carbon emissions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50ef7876-34f4-425f-b9e5-6d50ec7385d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) despite having 5% of the world's population and is responsible for inflicting more than [$1.9 trillion dollars in damage](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ab815c5-75ee-4290-95de-c1ab98e11e55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to other countries as a result of its carbon emissions. These numbers do not add up. We contributed to and continue to contribute to a global catastrophe that is impacting the economies, livelihoods, and lives of millions around the world.
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T824d0e9b-eb4b-49b7-8354-b3679ee6be1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | At COP27, world leaders [agreed](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6408259d-2937-487e-b6c5-ef2b65a70489/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to compensate developing countries for global warming costs -- a huge advancement in global climate policy. However, details on how the fund would operate remain in question. **There are many questions on when it will be finalized and become operational, and how exactly it would be funded. We must hold the U.S. to this agreement.** Taking accountability and addressing global inequality is essential in our fight against climate chaos. The U.S. must stop obstructing support efforts to countries most impacted by the climate disasters we help drive and fully back U.N. efforts to form a formal institution dedicated to aiding those countries. [**Sign the petition: The U.S. must take accountability for driving climate disaster around the world.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3756508a-7435-4131-8148-8cfb6f05d02d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56ee49ac-f0af-4db4-993d-6831b255a4cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda, and important progressive causes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b8db423-8ea8-4221-9a26-8094379e82b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212

body:
Senator Sinema announced she is leaving the Democratic Party.
#

Peter -
If you have been waiting for the perfect time to make your first online contribution to Ruben Gallego, today is the day.
Earlier this morning, and one month after Arizonans ran the table electing Democrats to statewide office, Senator Sinema announced she is leaving the Democratic Party.
She didn't even give Democrats a few days to celebrate holding the Senate before throwing things into chaos.
So today we are asking you to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego.
$3 to help Ruben know grassroots support will be there if and when he launches a campaign to defeat Senator Sinema.
$3 so we are prepared to take on the money from the lobbyists and Wall Street donors that fund her campaign.
$3 to send a message that you have had ENOUGH of Senator Sinema blocking the Biden agenda and making things harder for Democrats.
By the time you read this, lots of people have donated their $3 to Ruben’s campaign. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because that’s how we’ll beat Senator Sinema and her corporate backers: together.
[**Please use this link to make your first online $3 contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today. We will put your donation to work making sure we replace Senator Sinema in the Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221209-1-gm-sp50&t=1&akid=200%2E734936%2EEYOdn7)

[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=gallego-em-dec.r7FY6v&refcode=em221209-1-gm-sp50&t=2&akid=200%2E734936%2EEYOdn7)
More soon. Thank you.
Ruben Gallego For Arizona

clean_body: Senator Sinema announced she is leaving the Democratic Party. Peter - If you have been waiting for the perfect time to make your first online contribution to Ruben Gallego, today is the day. Earlier this morning, and one month after Arizonans ran the table electing Democrats to statewide office, Senator Sinema announced she is leaving the Democratic Party. She didn't even give Democrats a few days to celebrate holding the Senate before throwing things into chaos. So today we are asking you to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego. $3 to help Ruben know grassroots support will be there if and when he launches a campaign to defeat Senator Sinema. $3 so we are prepared to take on the money from the lobbyists and Wall Street donors that fund her campaign. $3 to send a message that you have had ENOUGH of Senator Sinema blocking the Biden agenda and making things harder for Democrats. By the time you read this, lots of people have donated their $3 to Ruben’s campaign. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because that’s how we’ll beat Senator Sinema and her corporate backers: together. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. More soon. Thank you. Ruben Gallego For Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Michael Peroutka
subject: The Political Significance of Christmas
body:
|
---
[ ](https://d2C1H704.na1.hubspotlinksstarter.com/Ctc/L0+113/d2C1H704/VVtgf87X6687N838c0x9kD0HW2v98dD4TmLVMN95jt8t3lSbNV1-WJV7CgSGdW8Qj6hw3h9tD7W3Fcz453VvLQfW1Kzln02BmCpYW5lmQP43GDvm2W6DS3671gxT3_W3CRph-4Cwvr5W7l7wTp5vtLw1W38Zbyv605TMdN7RkddxlLhfhW6YTB1l8w-FK9W564QDT46zBd8W4Hl8VT3vykpjW6J8m6t8lnHQbW6hBqwZ5kWMGFW6D1yww6f3YhxW3tgYD08tZkbSW5mRLZk5K8KMhW4PrBCf83zmdkW5XKyG16lkJK6W6vN8Xk2Jps_rVdQ30_3_ZHBXW79q6KR3Qx39T3hFz1)
---
THE POLITICAL SIGNIFICANCE OF CHRISTMAS In their effort to make a point, those who discuss law and government and politics for a living often miss the most critical – the most crucial point of all. So, as we celebrate Christmas, this is a good time to take a deep breath and revisit first principles. We should remember the **_political_** significance of Christmas. Now don’t get distracted by arguments that early Christians latched onto a pre-existing pagan holiday to establish the date of Christmas. That may be true, but it is a distraction from what’s truly important. The important thing is the birth of the Savior, Jesus Christ. The birth of the Savior is the most significant **_political_** event in human history. This bears repeating. The birth of Jesus Christ is the most significant political event in the history of the universe. Why? Well simply put, it is because liberty does not and cannot exist absent the acknowledgement of the Almighty, Omniscient, Living and Everlasting God of the Bible whose Son is Jesus Christ -- Who created the world, entered His own creation and sacrificed His life to cover our sins and make us presentable before the Throne of Grace. For liberty to exist in the world this acknowledgement of Christ’s authority must exist in the hearts of the people and it must be the operating principle of civil government. If it is, then peace on earth will prevail. But to the extent that the hearts of the people are distracted and the civil government forgets that it is a ministry of Jesus Christ, then injustice, chaos, corruption and tyranny will prevail. And the hearts of the people are, indeed, distracted from this truth; and this is no accident. It is the result of purposeful manipulation of the culture by those who control the major means of communication. The primary tool of this manipulation is the mantra of “Separation of Church and State”. Through the ceaseless repetition of this voodoo mantra, the culture has been conditioned to consider any public prayer, or any private prayer in a public place, or any acknowledgement of the Lord Jesus Christ, as an inappropriate encroachment of the Church. But this is a word trick and a mind trick. A prayer is not a church. An acknowledgement of God’s authority over civil government in the form of a prayer before a legislative session, or a court session is not a church. It is rather an expression of a political philosophy. And this particular political philosophy is the American political philosophy. It is contained in the Declaration of Independence which is the organic law of these united States. Therefore, there is nothing wrong or illegal about such an expression. Indeed, the acknowledgement of Jesus Christ as the Source of Law and Government is the very first presupposition of American government. Far from violating any law, worship of or acknowledgement of the authority of the Savior of the World through Christmas Nativity displays, public prayer, Ten Commandment displays and all other forms of Christian witness are consistent with and supportive of the American View of Law and Liberty and are the essence of American government. Publicly celebrating the blessed birth of the Savior of the World is not only patriotic; it is the most **politically correct** thing you will ever do. This is Michael Anthony Peroutka bringing you The American View. Merry Christmas!

name: Tony Evers
subject: Derek, please share your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek,

When we asked you to dig deep and support Senator Warnock in his runoff election, you came through in a big way.

Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, we were able to provide critical support to win in Georgia!

In 2023, we have to keep our focus because we have much to accomplish.

That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your opinion on the issues that matter most, Derek.

[Share your thoughts and complete our priority issues survey:](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1938?refcode=TE_EM_SV_3MU_20221209_1_1&t=5&akid=6118%2E1827488%2Ex7U-n1)

| ****[TAKE MY SURVEY](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1938?refcode=TE_EM_SV_3MU_20221209_1_1&t=6&akid=6118%2E1827488%2Ex7U-n1)****
---

In 2022, we faced enormous challenges.

We made progress in those fights because of your engagement, and I’m counting on you again in 2023.

[That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your thoughts. Click here to take our official issues survey.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1938?refcode=TE_EM_SV_3MU_20221209_1_1&t=7&akid=6118%2E1827488%2Ex7U-n1)

Thank you for your support and feedback.

Tony

This comes just after earlier this year Senator Karnes argued against allowing exemptions to West Virginia's abortion ban for rape and incest victims because he believes child rape victims often 'romanticize' their adult abusers.

clean_body: Senator Robert Karnes Defends Forced Sexual Contact within Child Marriage. = Fellow Democrat, This week Republican Senator Robert Karnes suggested that sexual assault in marriage is a "benefit to being married". Specifically Karnes said, "You want to make it a crime to do inside of a marriage what would be a crime to do outside of a marriage. Even though married partners assume, because it's part of the implied contract of marriage, that those kinds of things are going to be ok." This comes just after earlier this year Senator Karnes argued against allowing exemptions to West Virginia's abortion ban for rape and incest victims because he believes child rape victims often 'romanticize' their adult abusers. This pattern of extremist behavior can only be stopped with your help. Please chip in today to help us stop Karnes and these extremist ideas. His term is up in 2024....let’s keep it that way. | = | = | = | = | = | = We do not need this type of leadership in West Virginia._ = Thank you, Mike Pushkin, Chair = Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: We need to rebuild for success in 2023 and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
It's going to take time and money to rebuild... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2258276ec8&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I'll be honest - it is going to take time and money to rebuild the Washington State Republican Party infrastructure for success in 2023 and beyond - and if we want to do it right, we need [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dec70c8d84&e=6a281f566d) from engaged people like you.

We need your support so that we can recruit, train, and support good candidates for city council races, school board races, and other local offices and special election candidates in 2023. All of this work will help us lay the groundwork for success in 2024 within our targeted congressional races and other important statewide offices. **We must re-build and re-brand our party's communications capabilites to show that we WILL address the challenges facing everyday Washingtonians.**

**We've said it before, but we'll say it again: sustaining donors really make all the difference here at the Washington State Republican Party. **

We budget like you and your family do - we need to make sure our bills are paid, we put a bit away for rainy days - and anything left over goes towards building out our infrastructure to elect Republicans in our state.

When we know our budget in advance - your dollars make an even greater impact, and it doesn't take much to make a big difference.

Big checks are great, [but even $10 a month will help us establish our budget early so we can work on strengthening our digital organization, help fund candidates, and reach our friends and neighbors where they are. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=daec87c407&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f4c3467151&e=6a281f566d "BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR")
---
| We need your help to build a strong foundation for both 2023 and 2024. Chip in [$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ee8e652e73&e=6a281f566d), [$5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=eb47a0c918&e=6a281f566d), [or whatever you can afford](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=13f6f509e5&e=6a281f566d) each month to rebuild our party and change the future of Washington politics.

Thank you for your support, Peter!

Brady Batt
Executive Director
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| [Donate $5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=781353382c&e=6a281f566d "Donate $5")

clean_body: Friend, I need to speak with you RIGHT AWAY. Christmas is RIGHT AROUND THE CORNER , and I need YOUR help. My father has done more for the American People than any other President in the history of our Country. He will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN in 2024 and will always put America FIRST, so I want to surprise him with something that I know he'll cherish FOREVER: AN OFFICIAL TRUMP CHRISTMAS CARD SIGNED BY HIS FAVORITE PATRIOT:YOU I 'm going to show my father his Official Trump Christmas Card VERY SOON, so you'll need to hurry. Friend, out of my father's MILLIONS of Patriots, YOU have always been his BEST supporter, which is why I know he'll be honored to see YOUR NAME. Remember, when you add your name, you can also add a short note for him to read! Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Linda Sanchez
subject: Protecting Marriage Equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
I couldn’t be prouder to have joined my colleagues in passing this historic bill.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55774690/382763584/-1667771348?refcode=BLU-SAN-20221209-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWZiM2ZkNi0xOTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evvv0rsUqrHABMSJGhFhdc5Oj-WgEaJY3QkmwLfcptk=)
---
| Peter,

Yesterday, I voted to pass the Respect for Marriage Act. This historic bill will protect same-sex and interracial marriage, and recognize it as a fundamental right for all Americans.

Just as the same court that legalized same-sex marriage is poised to overturn it, this bill reaffirms our right to love and marry whomever we please.

I couldn’t be prouder to have joined my colleagues in passing this historic bill. Together, we have sent a resounding message that in America, love will always win.

Now that it heads to President Biden’s desk for his signature, I would also like to extend my gratitude to organizers and advocates across the country who made this a possibility.

I will never stop advocating for fair and equal treatment for all. Though this is a giant leap in the right direction, the fight doesn’t stop here.

[_**If you’re with me, I hope you will join me in adding your name in support of the Respect for Marriage Act.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55774691/382763585/-748572188?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWZiM2ZkNi0xOTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evvv0rsUqrHABMSJGhFhdc5Oj-WgEaJY3QkmwLfcptk=&emci=ae020e76-f677-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=aefb3fd6-1978-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6681226)

Team,
It was an honor to fight by your side over the past year to overcome the most difficult test this movement has ever faced. I am deeply grateful for your support.

But here’s the good news: According to my campaign team, you’re still eligible to make a refundable $50 ($100 for couples) this year with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Keith Ellison REMINDER: You have until December 31 to make a refundable donation of $50 (or $100 for couples) with Minnesota’s with Minnesota’s 2022 Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. = = | Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General PO Box 17224 Minneapolis, MN 55417 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ************ ************ **

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775134/382765268/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221209highlights_gv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1N2E2Yi0xZDc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTWJXQcmDytWf0bCHXOhnbea--2fghn9_WQL8fuLoTw=)

Team, While things may seem a bit quieter since Election Day has come and gone, don’t be fooled! Here on Team Vasquez, we’ve been hard at work setting up our congressional office and I’ve been preparing to serve you in January. Since the midterms ended and we won this crucial toss-up race, I’ve also had the opportunity to meet with so many supporters like you across NM-02 and celebrate our hard-fought victory. I look forward to more opportunities to celebrate and thank everyone who helped us win this campaign. After traveling to DC for freshman orientation in the U.S. House, I was glad to spend time with family during Thanksgiving and get back to our time-honored traditions. For us, that includes making and enjoying tamales de dulce! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775135/382765269/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221209highlights_gv_od90ds_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1N2E2Yi0xZDc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTWJXQcmDytWf0bCHXOhnbea--2fghn9_WQL8fuLoTw=)
---
Then, our campaign hosted a volunteer and staff victory party in Las Cruces to say thanks and celebrate — this WIN could not have happened without YOU.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775136/382765270/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221209highlights_gv_od90ds_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1N2E2Yi0xZDc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTWJXQcmDytWf0bCHXOhnbea--2fghn9_WQL8fuLoTw=)
---
I spent time with Albuquerque’s Westside Democrats and the Democratic Party of Bernalillo County — I’m so grateful for your incredible work this election cycle, and I’m ready to continue working together to bring real results to our gente! Thanks for bringing it home, Albuquerque!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775137/382765271/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221209highlights_gv_od90ds_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1N2E2Yi0xZDc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTWJXQcmDytWf0bCHXOhnbea--2fghn9_WQL8fuLoTw=)
---
It’s also with honor and pride that I have the opportunity to serve as a new member of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, the largest-ever class in Congress!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775138/382765272/685856095?refcode=fl_email_na_20221209highlights_gv_od90ds_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM1N2E2Yi0xZDc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTWJXQcmDytWf0bCHXOhnbea--2fghn9_WQL8fuLoTw=)
---
This is just the very beginning of my work and our movement for progress in NM-02. I can’t wait to be sworn-in to office in a few short weeks and start legislating!
Thank you again for getting us here. Vamos!
— Gabe

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Investing in education and childcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
This is one of my top priorities to get done before the end of the year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775348/382768031/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFkYzA0ZC0xZTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G00fIEoT7m_sK4WeNKBklr67uLOlmefoenYERDcArEo=&emci=6bb5a078-1178-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=fd1dc04d-1e78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — New Mexicans know the value of early childhood education — that’s why they voted overwhelmingly last month to invest in our kids. This change to New Mexico’s state constitution would increase funding for public and early childhood education programs without raising taxes. It would raise wages for educators and help make our public schools more equitable. After nearly a decade of work to pass this constitutional amendment, we have one last, big step: authorization in Congress. [**This is one of my top priorities to get done before the end of the year. Will you add your name next to mine to show your support for investing in education, childcare, and our educators?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775349/382768033/-588053516?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFkYzA0ZC0xZTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G00fIEoT7m_sK4WeNKBklr67uLOlmefoenYERDcArEo=&emci=6bb5a078-1178-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=fd1dc04d-1e78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55775350/382768040/-588053516?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFkYzA0ZC0xZTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G00fIEoT7m_sK4WeNKBklr67uLOlmefoenYERDcArEo=&emci=6bb5a078-1178-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=fd1dc04d-1e78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)
---

clean_body: This is one of my top priorities to get done before the end of the year. Folks — New Mexicans know the value of early childhood education — that’s why they voted overwhelmingly last month to invest in our kids. This change to New Mexico’s state constitution would increase funding for public and early childhood education programs without raising taxes. It would raise wages for educators and help make our public schools more equitable. After nearly a decade of work to pass this constitutional amendment, we have one last, big step: authorization in Congress. | New Mexicans know the value of early childhood education, and we're ready to invest in our state's most precious resource: our kids. [ Republicans may target this big COVID-19 topic in the next Congress. The National Emergency Declaration, which was declared early in the pandemic by former President Trump and extended by Biden, could be one of the first things the new congress fights. The National Emergency Declaration was at first used to allow the HHS access to waive requirements for federal health programs to make it easier to serve patients. It also allowed flexibilities in deadlines for filing COBRA claims and flexible spending accounts. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9N90NfNJ2ppD%2fNJkF7%2fOyg&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: A Paradigm-Shifting Budget
body:
Ending the woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10263755?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

Evidence of America’s fiscal brokenness is everywhere. Spiraling inflation, a national debt of $31 trillion and counting, and a bipartisan addiction to endless deficit spending in Congress.

But the problems don’t stop there. A large swath of the taxpayer-funded federal bureaucracy has become woke and weaponized against the American people, including our corrupt national security apparatus that cares less about keeping the American people safe than about keeping the regime in power.

That’s why the Center for Renewing America released our [FY2023 Budget](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7dea9dd6b5&e=17913c7d6d) addressing the nation’s fiscal challenges. The budget includes a comprehensive effort to both revitalize the economy and remove the scourge of woke and weaponized government bureaucracy aimed at the American people.

Highlights of the budget we put forward include:
* Balancing the budget in ten years
* Revitalizing a strong economy by accomplishing roughly 3% growth
* Achieving nearly $9 trillion in spending cuts over ten years while prioritizing cuts to woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy

**Budget Resources**

[Introduction to the Center for Renewing America FY2023 Budget](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=9cf28961c2&e=17913c7d6d)
[Woke Weaponized Examples of Cuts](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=200d32c99f&e=17913c7d6d)
[FY2023 Budget Summary](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c0dc107e79&e=17913c7d6d)
[Full Budget: A Commitment to End Woke and Weaponized Government](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3da701c1fd&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| **A Paradigm-Shifting Budget**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a1f8ba0efc&e=17913c7d6d)
---

In my [appearance](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=21770a9a32&e=17913c7d6d) on Kudlow on Fox Business, I made it clear that the outline of this budget is fairly simple. We need economic growth and cuts to government spending.

But what is paradigm-shifting about this budget is how it addresses the two greatest threats facing our country today: getting our fiscal house in order and stopping the woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy aimed at the American people.

**That means challenging establishment orthodoxy on cuts to discretionary spending versus entitlements like Social Security and Medicare. **

As I told [Roll Call](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=b905b316e1&e=17913c7d6d):

“ _There is a view on the Republican side that needs to be really tackled aggressively — that balance in 10 years is not possible, that you’ve got to go after Social Security and Medicare beneficiaries, that discretionary spending is not where the fight is, that defense needs to grow as far as the eye can see for 10 years._ ”

_We must starve the beast of woke discretionary spending_ , make significant cuts to balance the budget, and then build on that credibility with the American people to ultimately tackle entitlement reform.

**CRA FY2023 Budget:** [A Commitment to End Woke and Weaponized Government](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=997346753e&e=17913c7d6d)

This budget offers insight on how to approach the upcoming budget wars. It will also provide a foundation that both fiscal hawks and America First activists can find common ground on. Our goal is for this budget to be a model that can be followed by the incoming Congress and conservatives in Congress for decades to come.

| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President
Center for Renewing America
