clean_body: Ending the woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy. | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Evidence of America’s fiscal brokenness is everywhere. Spiraling inflation, a national debt of $31 trillion and counting, and a bipartisan addiction to endless deficit spending in Congress. But the problems don’t stop there. A large swath of the taxpayer-funded federal bureaucracy has become woke and weaponized against the American people, including our corrupt national security apparatus that cares less about keeping the American people safe than about keeping the regime in power. That’s why the Center for Renewing America released our addressing the nation’s fiscal challenges. The budget includes a comprehensive effort to both revitalize the economy and remove the scourge of woke and weaponized government bureaucracy aimed at the American people. Highlights of the budget we put forward include: Balancing the budget in ten years Revitalizing a strong economy by accomplishing roughly 3% growth Achieving nearly $9 trillion in spending cuts over ten years while prioritizing cuts to woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy Budget Resources | | A Paradigm-Shifting Budget | In my on Kudlow on Fox Business, I made it clear that the outline of this budget is fairly simple. We need economic growth and cuts to government spending. But what is paradigm-shifting about this budget is how it addresses the two greatest threats facing our country today: getting our fiscal house in order and stopping the woke and weaponized federal bureaucracy aimed at the American people. That means challenging establishment orthodoxy on cuts to discretionary spending versus entitlements like Social Security and Medicare. As I told : “ There is a view on the Republican side that needs to be really tackled aggressively — that balance in 10 years is not possible, that you’ve got to go after Social Security and Medicare beneficiaries, that discretionary spending is not where the fight is, that defense needs to grow as far as the eye can see for 10 years. ” We must starve the beast of woke discretionary spending , make significant cuts to balance the budget, and then build on that credibility with the American people to ultimately tackle entitlement reform. CRA FY2023 Budget: This budget offers insight on how to approach the upcoming budget wars. It will also provide a foundation that both fiscal hawks and America First activists can find common ground on. Our goal is for this budget to be a model that can be followed by the incoming Congress and conservatives in Congress for decades to come. | Sincerely, Russ Vought President Center for Renewing America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** 300 Independence Ave. SE Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kyrsten Sinema left the Democratic Party today, taking away our Senate majority, and snatching defeat from the jaws of victory. Stand with Ruben Gallego to answer this betrayal.
body:
Lost our majority already?!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te80b60d2-5d05-46f5-95d5-7e0b473c38c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **You’ve probably heard by now, but she's done it, KYRSTEN SINEMA HAS STABBED EVERY DEMOCRAT IN THE BACK.** **_During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years is when Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent._ ** _Sinema's counting on our being scared she'll split the vote in 2024 if we run a true Democrat, that we'll sit back and take her betrayal. Don't let her do it. You win not with fear, but leadership. _ _**_Congressman Ruben Gallego is a force, a charismatic, young, progressive Latino veteran, who understands "loyalty" in a way that is alien to Sinema. He's talked about primarying her already for all her betrayals. So let's get him in the race. Not next month or next year. NOW._** _ [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda6079bc-9c3b-4a28-88a8-885657b5035b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Only a response that Democrats won't be held hostage, will support Gallego with all they have while making her into a nobody by stripping her of all Senate power will get this done. She can't caucus with Republicans, or her plan to appeal to some Democrats fails. If she caucuses with nobody, she is a nobody, and we still retain our advantage (50-49-1, instead of 51-49, still enough for us to have a real majority)._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05055036-956a-4806-a6ba-e6bd9f70a884/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Even Joe Manchin didn't consult her when he cut a deal with Joe Biden in July. From CNN.com: _Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her._ **_So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024._** [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb15aaf00-5571-4cd7-b32a-ccbbd4b4a8a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
_Sorry we have to jump back into active mode again so soon. It wasn't what we wanted or expected. But, Sinema, as is her way, has left us no choice._ _I can't say thank you enough times._
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: 🏳️‍🌈 The Respect for Marriage Act passed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I was proud to vote and help pass the Respect for Marriage Act yesterday, which offers protections for same-sex marriages. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55769938/382741035/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFlNjVmOC1mOTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FfW66ytPk429ePEXd07s3S5TFD_JkO7CPBQzPq5f2Q=&emci=fffa5931-de77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d11e65f8-f977-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

After the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ earlier this year, it became clear that abortion rights weren't the only civil liberties on the line. We’ve seen extremist politicians roll back access to abortion care, and Justice Clarence Thomas made it clear they were ready to overturn marriage equality next.

We couldn't afford to wait for another devastating Supreme Court decision to take action to protect the members of our LGBTQ+ community. **That's why I was proud to vote and help pass the Respect for Marriage Act yesterday, which offers protections for same-sex marriages.**

Peter – no matter who you love, you deserve the same rights and protections as everyone else. This legislation is a step forward to ensuring that – regardless of the decisions handed down by the conservative Supreme Court – every person will continue to have the right to marry whomever they love.

While this is a step in the right direction, we still have more work to do to ensure our LGBTQ+ community members are protected and respected. As your congresswoman, I'll always fight to ensure every person is treated equally.

Thank you,

Kim
| [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55769940/382741037/-1882854921?refcode=em22_221209_marriage_esrv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221209_marriage_esrv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFlNjVmOC1mOTc3LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FfW66ytPk429ePEXd07s3S5TFD_JkO7CPBQzPq5f2Q=)

clean_body: I was proud to vote and help pass the Respect for Marriage Act yesterday, which offers protections for same-sex marriages. Peter, After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade earlier this year, it became clear that abortion rights weren't the only civil liberties on the line. We’ve seen extremist politicians roll back access to abortion care, and Justice Clarence Thomas made it clear they were ready to overturn marriage equality next. We couldn't afford to wait for another devastating Supreme Court decision to take action to protect the members of our LGBTQ+ community. That's why I was proud to vote and help pass the Respect for Marriage Act yesterday, which offers protections for same-sex marriages. Peter – no matter who you love, you deserve the same rights and protections as everyone else. This legislation is a step forward to ensuring that – regardless of the decisions handed down by the conservative Supreme Court – every person will continue to have the right to marry whomever they love. While this is a step in the right direction, we still have more work to do to ensure our LGBTQ+ community members are protected and respected. As your congresswoman, I'll always fight to ensure every person is treated equally. Thank you, Kim | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

I'm calling on my most LOYAL and steadfast supporters to STAND WITH ME against this HOAX. I need YOU to get on the team as an AMERICAN DEFENDER and tell the Left that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. - I've been going through these hoaxes and scams ever since the day I took my famous escalator ride in Trump Tower in 2015. body:

[](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHbAwXi1YWzwiVR22BOcczmag15Ydy7bgvINq9HnX30ATB0DqgXJSN9O9SGut_cvbFdO4WlHqouHrjMfazFpLuVgqRJ2pi3zOqxu6D-w2dkFpbvZzN9AuWPhnIoFF9EPbQsx-0il6rsHWZ7F0RkqvSMg5f6CSHCF_XmIP19y4tqsdYUXlK5yfOgabo7QXEs7HnIEALE3XmG4YznJ3E-X-qUe2YFRYj6wCrrwT7D7Pb-0ZL9bJKhVZ4bZ8EH3Ru7MSMDUL4mO8JNcmo7mzHQfVbzA6zgG_hSdnJKHR1d07uBv2iszGMj3MaNc_TnBisG9DB_sVJdyLcxdAf8AvSFBro0K3XCkwNaNgNQEhkRw37TzY/3ru/lv-1Ib_1TbuLDt-N5lIbMA/h0/qe12SSiRQsBGmVGNL8rJIb2imKHgx9iziUNUwAkgtQ8) She’s so right! name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our unprecedented slowdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After Bernie Sanders’ 2016 presidential campaign, a few staffers decided
to continue the work to fight to elect progressives by launching Justice
Democrats. For a team with a small budget, we’ve had quite an impact in
the last few years.

We recruited AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman to run and helped their
campaigns win in competitive primary elections against entrenched
incumbents. And now, this cycle we’ve helped Greg Casar and Summer Lee
win.

But here’s the unfortunate news: we’re facing an unprecedented slowdown in
our fundraising. And as a grassroots-supported organization, our
fundraising makes a big impact on the support we’re able to offer our
candidates.

If we don’t turn this around before the end of the year, we’re going to
have to start looking at where to make budget cuts.

Thank you for being a part of this movement to transform the Democratic
Party from the inside out. But we need to ask for your financial support

plans for 2023 and set our budget. Will you make a contribution?

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, After Bernie Sanders’ 2016 presidential campaign, a few staffers decided to continue the work to fight to elect progressives by launching Justice Democrats. For a team with a small budget, we’ve had quite an impact in the last few years. We recruited AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman to run and helped their campaigns win in competitive primary elections against entrenched incumbents. And now, this cycle we’ve helped Greg Casar and Summer Lee win. But here’s the unfortunate news: we’re facing an unprecedented slowdown in our fundraising. And as a grassroots-supported organization, our fundraising makes a big impact on the support we’re able to offer our candidates. If we don’t turn this around before the end of the year, we’re going to have to start looking at where to make budget cuts. Thank you for being a part of this movement to transform the Democratic Party from the inside out. name: South Bay CRA
subject: CRA Christmas Party Dec 10th
body:
Don't forget tomorrow's Christmas Party! Tomorrow Dec 10th South Bay CRA & Torrance Lomita PV CRA Christmas Party! Held at Walteria Business Club 2400
| |
---
|
---
## Don't forget tomorrow's Christmas Party! Tomorrow Dec 10th South Bay CRA & Torrance Lomita PV CRA Christmas Party! Held at Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave Torrance, CA
---
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
# Christmas Party
**RSVP ASAP nenarenae2@gmail.com**
The South Bay club and the Torrance, Lomita, Palos Verdes club will be holding a joint Christmas party Saturday December 10th 6pm-9pm suggested donation of $10 please also sign up to bring a side dish. Turkey and Ham will be provided. We will be giving out awards!
Help with the Christimas outreach we are doing by bringing a unwrapped toy. You can also make a cash donation or a check to "412" the ministry that is putting on the toy outreach.
**Christmas Party Dec 10th 6pm-9pm Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave Torrance, CA**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=91255.161.1.6d3dab2fdf9c412c2d545e5b4a8f9481)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: conservative news you need to read!
body:
In the lead-up to tomorrow's State Central Committee Meeting in Bolingbrook, we cover all the important stories of this week and more.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/09afd7176ced/alert-conservative-news-you-need-to-read?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Vargas: How IL Republicans, Powered by Grassroots Can Start Winning Again (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/vargas-how-il-republicans-powered-by-grassroots-can-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

For Republican voters, these are dark times. But they will get better. In his address to Congress (https://www.abrahamlincolnonline.org/lincoln/speeches/congress.htm?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 1862, just one month before signing the Emancipation Proclamation, Lincoln sought to reassure a broken country and offer hope during challenging times. The path forward here in Illinois is not an easy one, but at least there is a path – and a way forward. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/vargas-how-il-republicans-powered-by-grassroots-can-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/vargas-how-il-republicans-powered-by-grassroots-can-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Kaspar: It's Not About Money; to Win, We Must Learn from Virginia, Engage Grassroot Conservatives (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-its-not-about-money-to-win-we-must-learn-from-virginia-engage-grassroot-conservatives.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Virginia was critical to forming our more perfect union, and Illinois was critical to keeping a house once divided, standing. If flipping Virginia blue to red can happen, then Illinois also can be flipped. But Illinois only will flip if the IL GOP engages with the grassroots. With the grassroots engaged and focused, the IL GOP will have tens of thousands of volunteers to knock doors and get out the vote. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-its-not-about-money-to-win-we-must-learn-from-virginia-engage-grassroot-conservatives.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/kaspar-its-not-about-money-to-win-we-must-learn-from-virginia-engage-grassroot-conservatives.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Establishment Views Grassroots as Steerage, 3rd Class Citizens (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The establishment can learn from the grassroots. “The 3-T’s of being a good party member are TIME, TREASURE, and TALENT. Not everyone can give money, but just because they can give money does not make them somehow better than someone who gives the time (volunteering and doorknocking, especially) or the talent.” Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP National Committeeman's Law Firm Donated to Biden, Harris (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Recent revelations show that an IL GOP national committeeman’s law firm, where he is a senior partner, donated to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020, during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Points Fingers at Illinois Review, Despite Supporting Democrat Richard Irvin (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Embattled IL GOP chair Don Tracy is using the few allies he has left to fight back against the tsunami wave of support from the grassroots, who are calling for his resignation following embarrassing losses during the midterm election and new revelations that his family-owned business, Dot Foods, where he is an owner, ** donated to Joe Biden in 2020 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-points-fingers-at-illinois-review-grassroots-despite-supporting-democrat-richard-irvin.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IL GOP Chair Don Tracy's Memo Reveals His Flawed Understanding of our Party's Founding (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-memo-reveals-his-flawed-understanding-of-our-partys-founding.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In what may be a real window into ** embattled IL GOP Chair (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Don Tracy’s misunderstanding of the GOP, Tracy writes in a section of this past Friday’s Chairman’s Memo that “Republicans are the party of Jefferson, Lincoln, and Martin Luther King Jr.” This flawed understanding of the issues that led to the Republican Party’s founding shines light on Tracy’s lack of appreciation for the role diversity played in the GOP’s founding. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-memo-reveals-his-flawed-understanding-of-our-partys-founding.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-memo-reveals-his-flawed-understanding-of-our-partys-founding.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Sources: IL GOP in Panic Mode, Promising Uihlein Money to Silence Opposition of Embattled Chair Don Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/sources-il-gop-in-panic-mode-promising-uihlein-money-to-silence-opposition-of-embattled-chair-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

IL GOP State Central Committee members were calling constituents who expressed interest in attending Saturday’s State Central Committee meeting, and asking them to refrain from making public comments and calling for embattled ** chairman Don Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to resign. All of this while promising those constituents that more money would be flowing to the IL GOP from conservative mega donor and billionaire Richard Uihlein if Tracy remained in place as chairman. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/sources-il-gop-in-panic-mode-promising-uihlein-money-to-silence-opposition-of-embattled-chair-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=1a9dc0a935-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_09_07_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1a9dc0a935-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

subject: Backlash

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek —

Trump stooge Kevin McCarthy gave another “exclusive” interview in the Fox
News studio last weekend, and he made it clear that I’m still MAGA
Republicans’ Public Enemy No. 1 for the new House Republican Majority:

“Another change you’re going to get: Adam Schiff will no longer be on the
Intel Committee when I become Speaker. I promised that more than two years
ago.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) House Minorty Leader says on Fox News that “Another
change you’re going to get: Adam Schiff will no longer be on the Intel Committee
when I become Speaker. I promised that more than two years ago.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]Quickly, can you rush a $10 contribution to my campaign today to help
us respond to Kevin McCarthy’s attacks and fight back? If McCarthy does
become Speaker, it will be for empowering the most far-right QAnon fringes
of the GOP, and he will be beholden to more of their dangerous demands.

Kevin and the Republican Party have humiliated themselves by continuing to
support Donald Trump.

Trump has openly dined with anti-Semites and white supremacists at
Mar-a-Lago in the past few weeks. He’s showing us, Kevin, and the rest of
the world exactly who supports him.

Kevin is too cowardly to call him out for it. So instead, he’s playing his
same old game of distraction — singling me out because I refuse to let
Trump and his cronies get away with corruption, abuse our Constitution,
and lies about our elections.

It’s retribution and retaliation. Pure and simple.

Enough is enough. Republicans gerrymandered their way to a slim House
majority. But I intend to make this the last time Kevin McCarthy ever has
a hope of becoming Speaker.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]Chip in $10 to help me fight back against McCarthy’s attacks and start
the crucial work of winning back the House in 2024. Our work must start
now.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=dec2022_abs_em.hbyR4m&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em.1CmCse&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2022_abs_em.IT0Q1v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em.pdjp7M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2022_abs_em.n-QQjE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221209_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1012&akid=1437%2E5257348%2EqutlCR ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I’ve never backed down from the GOP’s threats. And I never will.

— Adam

The Democratic Party and Big Tech are joining forces to suppress YOUR VOICE | | | | | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Have you heard about what is brewing?

An unholy alliance between the Democratic Party and Big Tech companies is putting your right to free speech in grave danger. **[WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=73ac002db4&e=fdefed58de)**
We’ve already learned so much about how social media giants like Twitter suppressed potential election-changing information in 2020, and covered for President Biden’s son.

Your right to free speech is **UNDER ATTACK** by Silicon Valley Oligarchs and the corrupt Democratic Regime.
_ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!_
**[If this country stands a snowball’s chance in hell of making it through the destructive Biden era, it’s going to be because patriots like you stepped up and fought tooth and nail to take our country back.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0306d72cc9&e=fdefed58de)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Roberts?=
subject: Capitol Report December 9, 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for St
body:
Another court rules against Parson's effort to bust unions | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
December 9, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3047350a3d&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=91c8aa8441&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=09fd05d7f0&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Another court rules against Parson's effort to bust unions** The Missouri Court of Appeals Western District ruled on Dec. 6 that Gov. Mike Parson’s administration violated the constitutionally protected collective bargaining rights of state prison guards when it unilaterally ceased withholding union dues from members’ pay checks three years ago. In doing so, the unanimous three-judge panel upheld a trial judge’s findings that the administration’s actions were “unconstitutional, arbitrary, capricious and unreasonable.”

The Missouri Office of Administration, which handles payroll for state agencies, informed the Missouri Corrections Officers Association in December 2019 that it would cease withholding dues from the paychecks of the organization’s roughly 1,300 members. The move was widely seen as an attempt to bust the union by making it difficult to collect dues from members.

The administration originally claimed it could no longer withhold the dues because the union’s contract with the state Department of Corrections had expired, although negotiations on a new contract continued. However, since the state routinely withholds fees from other non-union employee organizations, OA soon shifted its rationale to claim the corrections officers association isn’t an employee organization since it included some retirees who aren’t active state employees.

Both Cole County Circuit Judge Jon Beetem, a Republican, and the appellate panel found this claim to also be a pretext since OA continued to withhold dues and fees at the behest of other employee groups that include non-employee members. Beetem ordered OA to resume payroll deductions for unionized corrections workers. The Parson administration likely will appeal the case, _Missouri Corrections Officers Association Inc. v. Missouri Office of Administration_ , to the state Supreme Court.
---
|
---
| **State expects anemic revenue growth after enacting tax cut**
Missouri budget officials expect state general revenue collections to increase just 0.7 percent during the 2024 fiscal year as a massive tax cut majority Republicans pushed through the legislature this fall is implemented and the state’s economy slows, bringing the recent double-digit revenue growth to an end.

The 0.7 percent growth figure announced Dec. 6 represents the “consensus revenue estimate,” an amount agreed to most years by the governor’s administration and legislative budget leaders to ensure all sides are working with the same numbers when crafting the next state spending plan. Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, will present his proposed state operating budget for FY 2024 to the legislature in January. The next fiscal year begins July 1.

The short-term impact from the anemic growth anticipated for FY 2024 will be mitigated by a more than $6 billion revenue surplus that has accrued in recent years, due in large part to an influx of federal stimulus funds and an inflation-driven boost in tax revenue. However, that surplus likely will dwindle quickly.

Missouri experienced 14.6 percent general revenue growth over the previous year in FY 2022, which ended June 30. Through the first five months of FY 2023, general revenue collections increased at a similarly robust rate of 14.5 percent. However, collections are expected to crater once the new tax cuts take effect in January with the revised consensus revenue estimate for FY 2023 anticipating just 1.4 percent growth for the year.

The new tax cuts are expected to cost the state more than $2 billion a year in lost revenue once fully implemented. Wealthier taxpayers will enjoy most of the benefit, with middle- and lower-income Missourians saving little to nothing on their tax bills.

The 2023 legislative session begins Jan. 4. Lawmakers must pass the appropriations bills that make up the FY 2024 state budget by a May 5 constitutional deadline.
---
|
---
| **Net state general revenue up 14.5 percent so far in FY 2023**
Net state general revenue collections were up 14.5 percent through the first five months of the 2023 fiscal year compared to the same period in FY 2022, going from $4.5 billion last year to $5.15 billion this year. Year-to-date revenue collections had been up 16.7 percent over the previous year through the first five months of FY 2023.

Net general revenue collections for November 2022 grew 4.8 percent compared to those for November 2021, going from $965.5 million last year to $1.01 billion this year. Missouri’s fiscal year runs from July 1 through June 30.
---
|
---

[_**SB 145**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5f04898714&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[**_SB 216_**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4d47bcc8d0&e=a088917f89) \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County

[_**SJR 21**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=19596308f9&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8777a9a221&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=709ddd64bd&e=a088917f89).

Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Another court rules against Parson's effort to bust unions The Missouri Court of Appeals Western District ruled on Dec. 6 that Gov. Mike Parson’s administration violated the constitutionally protected collective bargaining rights of state prison guards when it unilaterally ceased withholding union dues from members’ pay checks three years ago. In doing so, the unanimous three-judge panel upheld a trial judge’s findings that the administration’s actions were “unconstitutional, arbitrary, capricious and unreasonable.” The Missouri Office of Administration, which handles payroll for state agencies, informed the Missouri Corrections Officers Association in December 2019 that it would cease withholding dues from the paychecks of the organization’s roughly 1,300 members. The move was widely seen as an attempt to bust the union by making it difficult to collect dues from members. The administration originally claimed it could no longer withhold the dues because the union’s contract with the state Department of Corrections had expired, although negotiations on a new contract continued. However, since the state routinely withholds fees from other non-union employee organizations, OA soon shifted its rationale to claim the corrections officers association isn’t an employee organization since it included some retirees who aren’t active state employees. Both Cole County Circuit Judge Jon Beetem, a Republican, and the appellate panel found this claim to also be a pretext since OA continued to withhold dues and fees at the behest of other employee groups that include non-employee members. Beetem ordered OA to resume payroll deductions for unionized corrections workers. The Parson administration likely will appeal the case, Missouri Corrections Officers Association Inc. v. Missouri Office of Administration , to the state Supreme Court. | | State expects anemic revenue growth after enacting tax cut Missouri budget officials expect state general revenue collections to increase just 0.7 percent during the 2024 fiscal year as a massive tax cut majority Republicans pushed through the legislature this fall is implemented and the state’s economy slows, bringing the recent double-digit revenue growth to an end. body:
| | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBib7qyxQvMzLp35fUu-eBIipjl1H06XP01lGQySsgZug2JnibQl_RNdrPkxYF-Jp3UypC4gSHt2COfkY3wY8hn8L-3fTKj_k_NPgJKNq2yVCEZsxj6lr0c1lhPmx_nrqgKyDk7uYIH0bljsCVrzeHydBWsyXcOcVAtO5pWKVWN5nxMjVXWj_11fwjuGpIY8gajQFlZQoOwy9izL8gYScmG_wHyrdqQsK-kN7HLwl8x7WqFCBApHvoX4BmahW48aZQ5clfrMtq7XECZ4qIB0UPhRwv7gE2tELc-BBj-zZZosoD8AO3frBKFMmUAwwEfTaep0Y5e-IAcp0sJ_BZDne8Ti0/3ru/t-QEK8HaR8anf56ZclNDhg/h0/QYY4vVDdcCH_6GQYGrcD6-XisyKZsTw77xggznMbZ8I) | | Dear Friend,

It’s safe to say the BEAMW Small Business Networking Forum Event was a huge success. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3WPPWvCC2U04B5_Qp_U_HaoQfXei0UiBwu3MrxSinaoRHwEuD3CGo4iortjZk9sWZFtyZphxNGQ2RGmhnfGvKvUhQrou_32PRQZAelbVaxH4iKUifYTXfMYKJOJ0SX8fKG3YQaSbT4kzBcbe5701eVy2SjME3srWTeoT_qghS43PvRRF1o2bfioXHXylowfANCPJvu9RNQKBYVnr2Qu3VpurbWXQyoMwQIeUxjgfL_Mm5AVHgILNEsHOH9-n1W9i6VoGy9an7nsM2lchajYKVUA/3ru/t-QEK8HaR8anf56ZclNDhg/h1/dKz4HnrKVh2czw6HJm-7MeEkFuWzGIoY7uTbeHf-puc)
Empowering Minority and Women owned businesses will be one of my top priorities as your next Mayor. The future of Houston is bright and despite all of Houston's strengths, there are too many barriers that prevent minorities and women from participating in wealth-building through small business ownership.
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3OgRAobfJHnp2eMNXG42F8MUmXCb_tAxFoBQterMIVMNUtFl4Mvq5evAf1Q54TLyaKRKUN5CuR7EMniV_lYxOWgBYHtM54mC0OS_fqxk53pc89AmfjQBj-OzxlbnIL5lps5vibP3BL-LfvvRvoHyacWMPlOR6FB8PyXZVKjDEjLN0RdF-zdny-oKcdXHdTCZ9c3klCNTC9B2Oc6PS2upRm8ku-dxz1BS1JPW8VsITi1EcmyLPEYMo6m0PPMrke09SjAVHqs_WwBCVVYL1Lg5HsA/3ru/t-QEK8HaR8anf56ZclNDhg/h2/HfXg4XFYKhMdZzCt904Pl4Pnogjrr0K3lX6HeGinNUE)
The data shows that when those barriers are removed, there are major advances in economic mobility for minorities and women and everyone in our great city can succeed. We have a lot of work to do to make sure everyone in Houston can thrive, but with your [support](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3mbapZFgTmpNP-BlWhHvCfwnQZVNwcJwOc_gCTv5vYu39dVWbu8b-Hlk5sjoSU7bzT7QUTowmNgF8asbnl-3KVFHAH_2r2fqxXqlsF10eHdnQOfRkogx8qHF5uG3rSthIFdRRlt5WWDW3HoeWjjDSfIuDtJnnOGP6eVbT4-rSpFbPj3dvzs10mOwGPHnfj4oYTfStarRz_raB9uKPhhZQ-hFwv_7Hh3Shgxyeq3YhPfMaZlQ7aQUyOSOMvJWjOVVubBUUDqMdKsghYRw69sRxuQ/3ru/t-QEK8HaR8anf56ZclNDhg/h3/0uTf1pFXzdNbLTli0ewvT8EIx0juaxIHHwXZ_JStb8w) I know we can get there.
_

clean_body: | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. | | Dear Friend, It’s safe to say the BEAMW Small Business Networking Forum Event was a huge success. Empowering Minority and Women owned businesses will be one of my top priorities as your next Mayor. The future of Houston is bright and despite all of Houston's strengths, there are too many barriers that prevent minorities and women from participating in wealth-building through small business ownership. The data shows that when those barriers are removed, there are major advances in economic mobility for minorities and women and everyone in our great city can succeed. We have a lot of work to do to make sure everyone in Houston can thrive, but with your I know we can get there. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Together, Amanda K. Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. subject: [Signature Requested] Add your name and support Mark Kelly >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’d be honored if you would renew your support for our new mission.
#

Friends —
Thanks to the support of so many of you, Mark has won a full six-year term in the U.S. Senate.
In 2020, tens of thousands of folks signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022. Their support was one of the reasons we were so successful, and we couldn’t be more thankful for everyone who stepped up.
But now, Mark needs our help on this new mission: _delivering for the people of Arizona and the United States in the Senate, and bringing science, data, and facts back to Congress._
**So today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly. We’d be honored if you would renew your support for our next mission ahead.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he can count on you to fight by his side.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_dec22_em/?source=em221209-1-15&refcode2=4836.6688874.H6XPdM&akid=4836%2E6688874%2EH6XPdM)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_dec22_em/?source=em221209-1-15&refcode2=4836.6688874.H6XPdM&akid=4836%2E6688874%2EH6XPdM)**
Adding your name to support Mark is a simple and quick action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: support Mark in the Senate so he can deliver real results to improve people’s lives.
Because when you and thousands of others all step up and say you’re with Mark, you become part of our ongoing team.
Thank you in advance for adding your name, and for having Mark’s back.>
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4836%2E6688874%2EH6XPdM).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m officially your 51st Democratic vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Yinze + youse refused to back down.
#
Derek, the Senate stays 🔵!!!
Senator Raphael Warnock won his re-election, which means **I will officially be your 51st vote in the U.S. Senate. 🥰**
I’m *so* proud. In an ultra-competitive midterm year, with literally hundreds of million$ spent against us, we won historic victories in Pennsylvania, Georgia, and across the country.
Yinze + youse refused to back down, and now we’ll be stronger in our biggest fights. **I will proudly be the 51st vote to scrap the filibuster, codify Roe v. Wade, raise the minimum wage + a lot more.**
Srsly, Derek. Whether you showed up to knock doors, donated to an email like this one, or even just spread the word to your friends + family, your support helped power Dems to historic victories (first in PA, now in GA).
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator-Elect
P.S. This email is srsly just to say how grateful I am. But I’ll add on a reminder: in 2024, a full two-thirds of the Senate seats up for re-election belong to Democrats. We’ve got to get straight to work, so **[consider donating now to help us fight like h*ll for working families starting on Day 1.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49600?refcode=em20221209-8160&t=1&akid=8160%2E434096%2EZVpoZa)**
**[Donate Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49600?refcode=em20221209-8160&t=2&akid=8160%2E434096%2EZVpoZa)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221209-8160-footer&t=3&refcode2=8160_434096_ZVpoZa&akid=8160%2E434096%2EZVpoZa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=8160%2E434096%2EZVpoZa)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8160%2E434096%2EZVpoZa)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution accomplished a lot this year,
sending nine new progressives to the House, providing critical organizing

| | **Securing Our Southern Border IS Important 😡**
---
| |
---
This week, President Biden flew to Arizona to give a 16-minute [speech](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2651438b2c4ab38c0d6a0219566071&_e=nauGkKXPOKwX_w58cBwIgalvDLQNTLVoHFxMvhBI5CKzDlt6Gy0UQTVVuKSDa8t2lfKZG5VKoIwPzgVCzPED6HwH13d5SWr6eb_5oaClPlxRE8IU0VN76pipDbG5-r9lgRY0ZNKwkyRD8OeMq53taa7r7_I6JK_koHbBNetqOp2cA5_gMu0DyL3fajx9ZNGoyTWSuwKaCrnYUcWpFfQxQIzVUmdZf0MR1hXRNrG9p3dRltErZ9VFmEjtfcy1VTF-YMvlomp-7ERcI2vxtulmVh0xz6IkIj6DmiVdamj1Pgs%3D) at a computer chip factory, and while he was there, he was asked if he would visit the southern border, which was just a stone’s throw away. Biden’s response? He wasn’t going to make the 40-minute journey because he had [“more important things”](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2651438b2c4ab38c0d6a0219566071&_e=nauGkKXPOKwX_w58cBwIgbAErPg30htnj1s9fCQpZgOk3e0iuVtb92FgCuTpyBbeQtpPByplpnsUaEnDLaOZaKWjjvDSxvL3py3Ri7fAIvvVzVUlLQ6q-1HHRDTDrEuEeUmlPAud7lwyLsAFVm1IDN4ITUz6sAYGkUhLYrAPpK9GY1XFzSTqAk2Ia0OAQL9Q0_8QShuNtvTjYwGmRjJuWYD0U1udJjP66AljevRXTsQg9Iv08K3O_w2-T_4TE9IyvnKDdD3-j2hnTESoiNLLOT3i-Wowjyt0Jxo8BLa3CGY%3D) to do. This begs the question, what on earth does the president think is more important than addressing the disastrous humanitarian and national security crisis happening under his feckless leadership? Biden’s immigration policies—[open borders](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2651438b2c4ab38c0d6a0219566071&_e=nauGkKXPOKwX_w58cBwIgUtqpOxhfstjdxQvmwih7oU8Tm31Ls0c6DvOaGjFpmlA3Vp2t7w0lvUEH1gGxAy3ajkeVLc2kZmbZbSz3VnxM5sOLaQf1bY3Y3GctX6Jge4pQNOr8l7oXbRQ1xYFzcUjpaPdu9weYU-aYzIJfOLockCQHrfo2-9QthUzU70HJyXhMb_5ekn-Fo88Iu0MPDGZ57h-y3h05aS__uc3yFw8nPlOFakALsJ1ZMzhc2YtItOZBnQVzMLCF0A4JOrItmVH1qxPHhKiY8YY4UbSrvk1mLAGmvWpMJqhxbuGpe-hzN_U), [amnesty](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2651438b2c4ab38c0d6a0219566071&_e=nauGkKXPOKwX_w58cBwIgbAErPg30htnj1s9fCQpZgPbTxtFxVEzEQqIqCZJG-VFQ1pKgyD3I8y4jAim-EdSTXkWrRKHLcUWOHbrABh7I1Ox-1xp_03I01jIdKhvQ795H--pke-waONq4zCiVo6CKm2eOsxcR1PXs2ucAAIlcAiczXzbCwJsBCB2554w9CKEbEbGx8mzMw7Xrpl8y2ZMS_se1NHl6v9A8Z7Fhv_Ki6GeNCJA5jbR_1ORfeh1kRXucp1kW8zSkIDirfcCmWvXOeukRkrlvKIv9OZmAwFw3KE%3D), and [sanctuary cities](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1c2651438b2c4ab38c0d6a0219566071&_e=nauGkKXPOKwX_w58cBwIgbAErPg30htnj1s9fCQpZgNauuMrx8jhveC5SayVMZDz6-omnigACY6Mkle6_uZyIxgx4bjRzjd3FyIbl3p4MLSGzKgTxNNKq0Gjy4tE6eEncaAtrjMgbpxid_EwMrsDbQKFVU0i8oz33GBOf_Mrnb8IsX5c5dm7v_4vKvL1u04jO8MnU7zSKaLmb-bjs3NtY6_FWgv-H0KydVcE5_96M9aikDJx4XL6Ct-jdNhG7vZ6OXmTbdSBsW91YDOP5Z5rzI4x60BB47HuiNSH_xr5lEeP9NxS-wibMSdIZk4wIx7l)—are a threat to public safety for all Americans. With rampant crime, violence, and drugs that are sneaking past our border in droves, Biden and Kamala Harris have yet to lift a finger. This complacency is why we must band together and rally around Republicans who support strong border security, so we can send a message to the Biden administration that they are accountable for their destructive policies.

name: David Shadburn, LCV
subject: Previous climate action could be in jeopardy. Tell Congress to fund environmental programs TODAY.
body:
Help us reach our goal to deliver 8,000 petitions to Congress. |
---
| | **
Tell Congress: Protect climate action before the year ends by passing long-term government funding. **
In just a few weeks, additional climate deniers will be sworn into the House. If Congress doesn't pass a long-term spending bill with other critical provisions before then, an anti-environment House of Representatives could be enough to block implementation of climate policies, _including those contained in the historic Inflation Reduction Act._

**Congress must pass long-term funding to avoid sabotaging climate action. Add your name today -- it only takes a minute.
GOAL: 8,000 ACTIONS**
|
---
**[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
Peter --

On December 16, the federal government will shut down unless new funding is approved. Critical environmental agencies and programs could be thrown into limbo -- including those that protect clean air and water, aid the transition to clean energy, and advance environmental justice.

Delaying a budget until next year would hand environmental opponents in the House leverage to sabotage all of the progress we've made in the fight against climate change -- potentially derailing agencies' capacity to implement the historic climate bill passed this summer.

Congress must pass a comprehensive government funding bill _this year_.

[Peter -- we need your help: tell Congress to protect climate action by passing a yearlong government funding bill with increased, robust funding for environmental programs and critical provisions to safeguard immigrants, displaced workers, and wildlife. It takes just a moment to add your name. Every action brings us closer to our goal to deliver 8,000 petitions to Capitol Hill.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwYzWzf~/bUNsZ2JZeGJNS1RaTG5EdjZ6VmdzV05MS3loTXIzYnlQaUFXV21BakFIU0NZamdHS2Z5WFNyNk1KbVl2T2tLWmFQUUt3ZDJ4OXdsbGNiU0E4WHM0K0VVRzY4YUtybkpZblk2QUZUblN3UHc9S0/S0p0NHRQejE2Tm5JM2EySUZSbFBaY3c5Y3ZUSWtYb3RrS2hkNE9OQ2FqNldNeXFZdU8zN3BucHNLa3UwV3g5QktHS2ozRXcyMTNOMTFzeTRkbVk3Tm5GTysvV21KT1JVamtjbm5GZWM5M2s9S0)

This latest funding showdown is just a preview of what could happen when environmental opponents take office next year. Republicans in the House are promising to obstruct the EPA and block environmental protections. Meanwhile, environmental opponents are hoping to sneak anti-environmental provisions into must-pass bills before Congress breaks for the holidays, **like Senator Joe Manchin 's dangerous permitting rollbacks.**

Together, the environmental movement can demand that Congress protect the progress we've made in the fight for climate action and environmental justice -- _but that can only happen if we take action right now and make our voices heard._
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

On top of securing climate funding, the annual year-end funding bill is one last opportunity to secure other big wins before regressive Republicans take control of the House. It is also critical that Congress codify protections for DACA recipients, support our labor partners by assisting trade-impacted workers, and pass the Recovering America's Wildlife Act (RAWA) to provide historic funding for wildlife conservation programs. The Senate must also approve President Biden's nominees to lead environmental agencies and to serve as lifetime judges.

[Congress has the opportunity to protect climate action and advance other critical agenda items over the next few weeks -- but it will only happen if the environmental movement keeps up the pressure. Add your name today and help us reach our goal to deliver 8,000 petitions.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwYzWzf~/bUNsZ2JZeGJNS1RaTG5EdjZ6VmdzV05MS3loTXIzYnlQaUFXV21BakFIU0NZamdHS2Z5WFNyNk1KbVl2T2tLWmFQUUt3ZDJ4OXdsbGNiU0E4WHM0K0VVRzY4YUtybkpZblk2QUZUblN3UHc9S0/S0p0NHRQejE2Tm5JM2EySUZSbFBaY3c5Y3ZUSWtYb3RrS2hkNE9OQ2FqNldNeXFZdU8zN3BucHNLa3UwV3g5QktHS2ozRXcyMTNOMTFzeTRkbVk3Tm5GTysvV21KT1JVamtjbm5GZWM5M2s9S0)

We are so grateful for everything you do to protect our environment and the health of our communities, Peter. Thank you for taking the time to check in and take action during the busy holiday season.

Onward,

David Shadburn
Government Affairs Advocate, Climate Change & Clean Energy
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9002272&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDIwMDgzOAS2&spReportId=MTY0MDIwMDgzOAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9002272&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDIwMDgzOAS2&spReportId=MTY0MDIwMDgzOAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
